notes: 枝幹收束×雙層樞紐:醒世樞紐為商旅營地(購物/情報),夢中樞紐為十年前的慶典廣場(以記憶交易)。四瓶頸:first_sleep 初次入夢、pyre_vision 處刑重演、wake_interlude 黃昏中場、final_choice 誰承擔記憶。伏筆:翡翠花借隊員之聲(heart_hollow 回收)、種子入影(shadow_seed 回收)、井底童謠(sleepwalker_ring 與 seffa_parley 回收)、瑪珂閃躲(accuser_row/marko_confession 回收)、孩童畫中綠髮女孩(child_seffa 回收)。風險換報酬:井底溺夢、面具以記憶換、火中取護符、藤橋捷徑、敲夢鐘引獵犬、地窖藤繭。中Boss 村長影為 combat 型,終Boss 森心瑟芙可勸可戰;seffa_parley 與 heart_seffa_boss 兩節點內皆含 bad 結局選項,傾向不足時引擎將善選轉入該結局,敘事寫作勸說崩解。黃金路徑約 32-36 節點。

nodes.title: 敞開的村口
nodes.directive: 隊伍受商隊之託送藥進苔鐘村,踏進村口便發現異狀:家家門敞、灶上湯還冒熱氣,卻無一人聲。強調濕綠的空氣、花香底下一絲腐味。遠處廣場的古樹隱約泛著翡翠色的光。不要急著解釋原因,讓玩家自己選擇查探方向。
nodes.narration: 苔鐘村的村門大敞著,門閂躺在泥地上,像被人隨手一扔。你們原是替商隊送一箱傷藥進村,此刻卻只聽見自己的腳步聲。左手第一戶人家的門也開著,灶上的湯還冒著熱氣,木勺斜插在鍋沿,桌邊的凳子歪向一側,彷彿吃飯的人只是離席片刻。風從森林那頭吹來,濕綠的氣味裡混著花香,香得過了頭,底下壓著一絲腐意。村子深處的廣場上,那棵古樹的樹冠泛著不該屬於黃昏之外任何時辰的翡翠色微光。

choices.text: 直奔廣場,查看那棵發光的古樹
choices.textEn: Head straight for the square and the glowing tree

choices.text: 先進最近的民宅,看看灶邊的人去了哪裡
choices.checkHint: 調查:飯桌與灶邊的痕跡
choices.textEn: Enter the nearest house first and see where its people have gone

choices.text: 村外有商旅營火,先去打聽情況
choices.textEn: Seek out the caravan fire outside the village and ask what happened

nodes.narrationEn: The gate of Mossbell Village stands wide open, its bar lying in the mud as if tossed aside in passing. You came to deliver a crate of salves for the caravan; now you hear nothing but your own footsteps. The first house on the left stands open too — soup still steaming on the stove, the wooden ladle propped against the pot's rim, a stool tipped askew at the table, as if whoever was eating had only stepped away for a moment. The wind comes off the forest, and the wet green smell of it carries flowers — sweet, far too sweet, with a thread of rot pressed underneath. Deep in the village, above the square, the crown of the old tree glows with a faint emerald light that has no business belonging to any hour but dusk.

nodes.title: 翡翠花開
nodes.directive: 廣場古樹一夜之間開滿翡翠色的花,花瓣半透明,脈絡裡有光流動。其中一朵貼近人臉的高度,用隊伍中最年輕成員的聲音反覆說「救我」。這是全劇最早的鉤子,務必讓那個聲音準確、熟悉、令人不安。觸碰花朵會驚動樹下的藤蔓。
nodes.narration: 古樹比你們想的更大,樹冠鋪滿整個廣場的天空,一夜之間開滿了翡翠色的花。花瓣半透明,像薄玉,脈絡裡有淡淡的光緩緩流動,整棵樹亮得近乎呼吸。你們站在樹下,聽見一個聲音。「救我。」那朵花就開在人臉的高度,聲音不大,卻讓你們同時僵住——那是隊伍裡最年輕那位的聲音,連尾音裡那點含糊都一模一樣。可他此刻就站在你們身邊,嘴唇沒動,臉色比花瓣還白。花又說了一次:「救我。趁鐘還沒響。」

choices.text: 伸手觸碰那朵借聲說話的花
choices.textEn: Reach out and touch the flower that speaks with a borrowed voice

choices.text: 不碰,湊近細聽花裡還說了什麼
choices.checkHint: 感知:從氣音裡聽出更多字句
choices.textEn: Do not touch it — lean close and listen for what else it says

choices.text: 退開古樹,先繞去民宅查證
choices.textEn: Back away from the tree and check the houses first

nodes.narrationEn: The old tree is larger than you imagined — its crown roofs the whole sky above the square, and overnight it has burst into emerald flowers. The petals are translucent, like thin jade, faint light drifting slowly through their veins; the whole tree glows as if it were breathing. You stand beneath it, and you hear a voice. "Save me." The flower hangs at the height of a face. The voice is quiet, but it freezes all of you at once — it is the voice of the youngest of your company, down to the little slur at the end of the words. Yet he stands right beside you, lips unmoving, face paler than the petals. The flower speaks again: "Save me. Before the bell rings."

nodes.title: 花裡的氣音
nodes.directive: 玩家耐心聽花,花用同一個借來的聲音斷續吐出:「瑟芙」這個名字、「別讓他們點火」、以及「日落之後,夢就不放人了」。給出時限概念:今日日落是死線。花說完便黯淡下去,像耗盡了力氣。
nodes.narration: 你們屏住呼吸,把耳朵湊近花瓣。那個借來的聲音又輕又急,像隔著水面說話:「瑟芙……我叫瑟芙。」停頓,花脈裡的光顫了顫。「別讓他們點火。這次別讓他們點火。」再停頓,久到你們以為它枯了,最後幾個字才擠出來:「日落之後,夢就不放人了。全村的人,連你們。」光從花脈裡退去,花瓣垂下,像一隻鬆開的手。村裡沒有任何一塊碑、任何一張嘴提過「瑟芙」這個名字,可睡著的村民滿屋都在念它。

choices.text: 進沉睡者的屋子,聽他們念的是不是同一個名字
choices.textEn: Enter the sleepers' houses and hear whether they murmur the same name

choices.text: 去商旅營地,問問外地人聽過瑟芙沒有
choices.textEn: Go to the caravan camp and ask the outsiders about Seffa

choices.text: 去鐘樓查村史,找被抹去的名字
choices.textEn: Search the bell tower records for an erased name

nodes.narrationEn: You hold your breath and bring your ears close to the petals. The borrowed voice is faint and urgent, like someone speaking through the surface of water: "Seffa… my name is Seffa." A pause; the light in the flower's veins trembles. "Don't let them light the fire. Not this time." Another pause, so long you think the flower has withered, before the last words squeeze through: "After sundown, the dream lets no one go. The whole village. You too." The light drains from the veins and the petals droop, like a hand letting go. No stone in this village, no mouth, has ever spoken the name Seffa — yet the sleeping villagers murmur it, house after house.

nodes.title: 熱湯與畫
nodes.directive: 民宅裡一家三口伏在飯桌上沉睡,呼吸整齊得詭異,湯還是熱的,證明全村是同一刻睡去。孩子懷裡抱著一張蠟筆畫:綠頭髮的女孩站在大樹底下,牽著一個小小的人。這是 child_seffa 的伏筆,不要點破。
nodes.narration: 屋裡一家三口伏在飯桌上,母親的手還搭在湯勺上,父親的額頭抵著碗沿,呼吸卻整齊得像同一具身體。你們探了脈——都活著,只是叫不醒,搖到肩膀脫臼也不會醒的那種沉。湯是熱的,麵是軟的,他們是在同一口飯之間睡過去的,全村都是。孩子趴在桌角,懷裡抱著一張蠟筆畫:綠頭髮的女孩站在大樹底下,牽著一個畫得小小的人,兩個人頭上塗了一圈歪歪的太陽。孩子的嘴唇在睡夢裡一張一合,你們俯身去聽,他念的是一個名字:「瑟芙。」

choices.text: 挨家查看,確認其他沉睡者念的是否同一名字
choices.textEn: Go house to house and confirm the other sleepers murmur the same name

choices.text: 回廣場,古樹的花或許知道這名字
choices.textEn: Return to the square — the tree's flowers may know this name

choices.text: 帶著畫去商旅營地問外地人
choices.textEn: Take the drawing to the caravan camp and ask the outsiders

nodes.narrationEn: Inside, a family of three lies slumped over the dinner table — the mother's hand still on the ladle, the father's brow against the rim of his bowl, their breathing as even as a single body's. You check their pulses: alive, all of them, only impossible to wake — the kind of sleep that would not break if you shook a shoulder from its socket. The soup is hot, the noodles soft; they fell asleep between one mouthful and the next, and so did the whole village. The child lies at the table's corner, hugging a crayon drawing: a green-haired girl beneath a great tree, holding hands with a small stick figure, a crooked sun scribbled above them both. The child's lips part and close in his sleep. You lean down to listen. He is saying a name: "Seffa."

nodes.title: 纏屋的藤蔓
nodes.directive: 多戶人家的沉睡者都在念「瑟芙」,更駭人的是:翠綠藤蔓從每一扇窗、每一道門縫探進屋內,溫柔地纏在沉睡者的手腕與腳踝上,另一端全都伸向森林深處。割藤會讓沉睡者痛苦抽搐並驚動縛靈。
nodes.narration: 第二戶、第三戶、第五戶,每一個沉睡者的唇形都一樣:瑟芙,瑟芙。而藤蔓比名字更早進了屋。翠綠的藤從窗縫、門底、灶口的煙道裡探進來,細的像絲線,粗的像手臂,溫溫柔柔地纏在每個沉睡者的手腕和腳踝上,不勒、不拽,只是牽著。你們推開後窗,看見所有藤蔓在屋外匯成一股,貼著地面翻過籬笆,朝森林深處延伸而去,綠得發亮,像一條倒著流的河。有人試著碰了碰藤身,沉睡的老婦立刻蹙起眉,喉嚨裡發出小獸似的嗚咽。

choices.text: 拔刀割斷藤蔓,先把人從藤上解下來
choices.textEn: Draw a blade and cut the sleepers free of the vines

choices.text: 不動藤,循著藤蔓出屋追蹤它的去向
choices.checkHint: 生存:辨認藤蔓匯流的主脈
choices.textEn: Leave the vines be — follow them out and trace where they run

choices.text: 先去鐘樓查村史,弄清瑟芙是誰
choices.textEn: Go first to the bell tower and learn who Seffa was

nodes.narrationEn: The second house, the third, the fifth — every sleeper's lips shape the same word: Seffa, Seffa. And the vines got into the houses before the name did. Green tendrils probe in through window cracks, under doors, down the stove flues — some thin as thread, some thick as arms — winding gently, gently around every sleeper's wrists and ankles. They do not squeeze. They do not pull. They only hold. You push open a back window and see every vine in the village joining into one strand outside, hugging the ground, climbing the fences, running toward the deep forest — green and shining, like a river flowing backward. Someone touches a vine, lightly. The sleeping old woman's brow creases at once, and a small animal whimper rises in her throat.

nodes.title: 倒流的綠河
nodes.directive: 隊伍循藤到村緣,發現全村的藤蔓在林口匯成一條主脈,鑽進森林深處;林口的霧綠得像水。最粗的一股卻反常地折回村內,鑽進村長家的窗。給玩家方向感:森林是終點,村長家藏著線索。
nodes.narration: 藤蔓在村緣匯成一條綠河。你們蹲在籬笆邊數,起碼上百股,全從各家各戶爬出來,在林口擰成一條大腿粗的主脈,鑽進森林深處。林子裡的霧也是綠的,濃得像化開的水草,吸一口,舌根都是花香和淤泥味。就在你們準備記下方位時,有人注意到反常:一股幾乎最粗的藤,竟從主脈裡分出來,掉頭折回村內,貼著牆根一路爬,最後從一扇雕花木窗鑽了進去。那是全村最體面的一棟房子。門楣上掛著匾:村長宅。

choices.text: 跟著那股回頭藤,進村長家看個究竟
choices.textEn: Follow the returning vine into the Elder's House

choices.text: 先回商旅營地整備,再作打算
choices.textEn: Go back to the caravan camp first and take stock

nodes.narrationEn: At the village's edge the vines gather into a green river. Crouched by the fence you count at least a hundred strands, crawling out of every house, twisting together at the treeline into one trunk thick as a man's thigh before it dives into the deep forest. The mist in the woods is green too, thick as dissolved waterweed; one breath of it leaves flowers and silt on the back of your tongue. Just as you set to marking the bearing, someone notices the exception: one of the thickest vines splits away from the main trunk and doubles back into the village, hugging the base of the walls all the way to a carved wooden window, and slips inside. It is the handsomest house in the village. The plaque above the door reads: the Elder's House.

nodes.title: 藤蔓縛靈
nodes.directive: 被驚動的藤蔓自地面立起,纏成人形,空心的胸腔裡有翡翠光。它們的攻擊以纏勒為主,戰鬥中可描述沉睡的村民隨藤的動作皺眉。戰後在斷藤裡發現一縷長長的綠色髮絲。
nodes.narration: 藤蔓動了。不是風吹的那種動——離你們最近的幾股藤霍然離地立起,層層盤繞,絞成三個人形的輪廓,空心的胸腔裡各懸著一點翡翠色的光,像一顆不肯熄的心。它們沒有臉,卻齊齊「看」向你們,綠光隨著你們的呼吸明滅。廣場另一頭,幾株矮藤鼓成拳頭大的芽苞,表皮繃得發亮,隨時會炸開噴出孢子。沉睡的村民在各自的屋裡同時皺起了眉,彷彿接下來的每一刀,都會落在夢的皮膚上。

combat.intro: 藤蔓絞成三具無臉的人形,空心的胸腔裡各懸一點翡翠光,朝你們無聲圍攏。
combat.introEn: The vines twist into three faceless human shapes, a point of emerald light hanging in each hollow chest, and close in on you without a sound.

choices.text: 檢視斷藤——裡面纏著一縷綠色長髮
choices.checkHint: 調查:辨認髮絲與花脈同源
choices.textEn: Examine the severed vines — a lock of long green hair is tangled inside

choices.text: 退回商旅營地包紮整備
choices.textEn: Fall back to the caravan camp to bind your wounds and resupply

nodes.narrationEn: The vines move. Not the way wind moves them — the strands nearest you rear up off the ground, coiling layer over layer into three human outlines, each hollow chest holding a point of emerald light, like a heart that refuses to go out. They have no faces, yet they "look" at you as one, the green light waxing and waning with your breathing. Across the square, several low vines swell into fist-sized buds, skins stretched shining-tight, ready to burst and throw their spores. In their houses, the sleeping villagers frown in the same instant — as if every blow that follows will land on the skin of the dream.

nodes.title: 商旅營地
nodes.directive: 村外坡地上的商旅營地是醒世樞紐:胖商人巴魯與夥計因宿在村外而未沉睡,嚇得半死卻捨不得貨。此處可購物補給、休息、打聽情報。巴魯賣傷藥、火把、繩索與少量武具;提到村裡的藥婆瑪珂也醒著,正在自己的貨車邊發抖。
nodes.narration: 村外的坡地上支著三頂帆布帳,營火燒得很旺,旺得像在壯膽。胖商人巴魯攥著一柄防身短棒迎上來,見你們不是夢遊的村民,長長吁了口氣:「昨夜還好好的!今早進村收山貨,全村橫七豎八睡了一地,拖都拖不醒!」他的貨車敞著,傷藥、火把、繩索、幾件二手武具,明碼標價,亂世不賒帳。「要補給趁現在,日落前我一定拔營。」他壓低聲音,朝營地邊緣努了努嘴:「村裡的藥婆瑪珂也醒著。從早上起就坐在她那輛貨車邊,一句話不說,抖。」

choices.text: 去找藥婆瑪珂,她是村裡唯一醒著的人
choices.textEn: Find Marko the herb-woman — the only villager still awake

choices.text: 付幾枚銀幣,向巴魯打聽這村子的舊事
choices.textEn: Pay Balu a few silver and ask about the village's past

choices.text: 補給完畢,前往鐘樓查村史
choices.textEn: Finish resupplying, then search the bell tower records

nodes.narrationEn: On the slope outside the village three canvas tents stand pitched, their campfire burning high — high the way a fire burns when someone needs the courage. Balu, a fat merchant clutching a short cudgel, hurries to meet you, and lets out a long breath when he sees you are not sleepwalking villagers: "They were fine last night! I went in this morning to buy mountain goods, and the whole village was sprawled out asleep — you can't drag them awake!" His wagon stands open: salves, torches, rope, a few second-hand weapons, every price marked plain. No credit in troubled times. "Buy while you can. I break camp before sundown, no matter what." He lowers his voice and juts his chin toward the camp's edge: "Marko's awake too — the village herb-woman. Been sitting by her wagon since morning. Not a word. Just shaking."

nodes.title: 巴魯的舊聞
nodes.directive: 巴魯收了錢便打開話匣:十年前苔鐘村辦過一場「還願祭」,那年之後村裡的鐘就再沒響過,商隊也被叮囑別在村裡過夜。他記得當年村口貼過通緝似的告示,畫的是個綠頭髮的女人。可順勢購物。
nodes.narration: 銀幣落袋,巴魯的話匣子開了。「這村子邪門不是一天兩天。十年前我跟我爹跑這條線,趕上他們辦『還願祭』,全村戴面具唱童謠,火燒得半邊天紅。打那年起,鐘樓的鐘就再沒響過——你們見過哪個叫苔鐘村的地方沒有鐘聲?」他搓著手指回憶:「當年村口貼過一張告示,畫著個綠頭髮的女人,底下寫的什麼『林妖』『禍源』。我爹說,別多問,商人只管過路。」他頓了頓,把一捆火把塞過來:「拿著,算搭頭。這村子的夜,不能信。」

choices.text: 去水井邊看看,巴魯說夜裡井裡有歌聲
choices.textEn: Go look at the well — Balu says there is singing in it at night

choices.text: 去鐘樓,查那口十年不響的鐘
choices.textEn: Go to the bell tower and the bell ten years silent

choices.text: 去找藥婆瑪珂對質舊事
choices.textEn: Confront Marko the herb-woman with the old story

nodes.narrationEn: The silver disappears into his purse and Balu's tongue comes loose. "This village has been wrong for a long while. Ten years back, my father and I ran this route and hit their Vow-Keeping Festival — the whole village in masks, singing that nursery rhyme, fire burning half the sky red. From that year on, the tower bell never rang again. You ever heard of a place called Mossbell with no bell?" He rubs his fingers together, remembering. "There was a notice posted at the gate that year, like a wanted bill. A green-haired woman, and under her, words like forest witch, root of calamity. My father said: don't ask. A merchant minds the road." He pauses, then pushes a bundle of torches into your arms. "Take them, on the house. The nights here can't be trusted."

nodes.title: 藥婆的貨車
nodes.directive: 藥婆瑪珂五十來歲,是村裡人卻宿在車上,因而未睡。她賣苦茶(飲後一日內在夢中神智清明)與傷藥,態度熱絡,但一被問到十年前或「瑟芙」就眼神閃爍、顧左右而言他,並下意識瞥向水井方向。這份閃躲是後期告發者身分的伏筆。
nodes.narration: 瑪珂的貨車停在營地邊緣,車板上晾滿藥草,人卻縮在車轅上,指節攥得發白。見你們過來,她像抓住浮木似的打起精神,翻出幾包傷藥和一壺黑漆漆的苦茶:「喝了它,睡著了心裡也亮堂,做夢都知道自己在做夢。老方子,便宜賣。」她手腳麻利,話也多,可當你們提起「十年前」三個字,她的手停了半拍;再問「瑟芙是誰」,她乾脆別過臉去擺弄藥包,聲音發緊:「沒聽過。村裡沒這個人。」她的眼睛卻不受控地,朝村中水井的方向瞟了一下。

choices.text: 順著她的目光去水井查探
choices.textEn: Follow her glance and go search the well

choices.text: 不逼她,買下苦茶,轉去鐘樓
choices.textEn: Press her no further — buy the bitter tea and turn for the bell tower

choices.text: 回營地與巴魯核對她的說法
choices.textEn: Go back to the camp and check her story against Balu's

nodes.narrationEn: Marko's wagon stands at the camp's edge, its boards spread with drying herbs, its owner huddled on the shaft with her knuckles clenched white. When you approach she rallies like a drowning woman catching driftwood, digging out packets of salve and a pot of pitch-black bitter tea: "Drink this and your mind stays lit even in sleep — you'll dream and know you're dreaming. An old recipe. Cheap." Her hands are quick and her talk runs freely, but when you say the words ten years ago, her hands stop for half a beat; when you ask who Seffa is, she turns away to fuss with her herb packets, voice gone tight: "Never heard it. No such person in this village." And her eyes, disobedient, flick once toward the village well.

nodes.title: 井口的童謠
nodes.directive: 石砌水井深不見底,井裡飄出小女孩哼唱的童謠,調子溫柔,歌詞卻斷續:「鐘響三聲花就開,名字埋進土裡來……」。下井有溺入夢境的風險,但井底有東西在發光。讓玩家權衡。
nodes.narration: 水井在兩條巷子的交口,石沿上長滿厚苔,轆轤的繩子早爛了。你們還沒走近,就聽見歌聲——井裡飄出來的,小女孩的嗓音,哼著一支搖籃般的童謠:「鐘響三聲花就開,名字埋進土裡來;土裡的名字發了芽,誰把它忘了,誰就別回家……」調子溫柔,詞卻讓人脊背發涼。你們探頭往下看,井水黑得像墨,深處卻有一點翡翠色的光,一明一滅,和廣場那棵樹的花同一種顏色。歌聲就是從那點光的位置浮上來的,水面連一絲漣漪都沒有。

choices.text: 繫繩下井,潛向那點翡翠光
choices.checkHint: 運動:憋氣潛入冰冷井水
choices.textEn: Rope up and dive for the point of emerald light

choices.text: 不下井,記全童謠歌詞,去比對沉睡者的呢喃
choices.textEn: Stay above — write down the whole rhyme and match it against the sleepers' murmurs

choices.text: 先去鐘樓,查「鐘響三聲」的說法
choices.textEn: Go first to the bell tower, and the matter of the bell ringing thrice

nodes.narrationEn: The well stands where two lanes cross, thick moss on its stone lip, the windlass rope long rotted. Before you even reach it you hear the singing — drifting up out of the well, a little girl's voice, humming a cradle-song of a rhyme: "When the bell rings thrice the flowers wake, the name goes under the loam; the name in the loam puts out a shoot — and who forgets it never goes home…" The tune is gentle. The words crawl up your spine. You lean over the rim: the water is black as ink, but far down there is a point of emerald light, pulsing — the same colour as the flowers on the tree in the square. The singing rises from exactly where the light is. The water's surface holds not one ripple.

nodes.title: 井底的種子
nodes.directive: 風險換報酬:下潛者在井水裡被夢境短暫拖拽,看見火光與面具的碎片幻象,嗆水受些苦頭(敘事扣血由DM裁量),但摸到一枚溫熱的翡翠種子與幾枚舊銀幣。強調夢裡看見的畫面醒後仍歷歷在目。
nodes.narration: 井水冷得像刀。下潛的人剛過一半,水忽然變「稠」了——不是水草,是夢。眼前炸開不屬於井底的畫面:沖天的火光、一圈一圈旋轉的木面具、一個孩子的尖叫被鐘聲蓋過。你們在幻象裡嗆了水,肺裡火燒火燎,幾乎分不清上下,全憑繩子把人拽了回來。可拳頭裡攥著東西:一枚溫熱的種子,翡翠色,脈絡裡有光緩緩流動,躺在掌心裡輕輕搏動,像一顆小小的心臟。井底的淤泥裡還撈上來幾枚十年前鑄的舊銀幣,邊緣都被燒熔過。

items.name: 記憶種子
items.properties: 溫熱、微微搏動;貼近沉睡者時,對方的呢喃會變得清晰;似乎是打開某段被埋葬記憶的鑰匙

items.name: 燒熔的舊銀幣
items.properties: 十年前鑄造,邊緣有火燒熔痕;可作為當年那場火的物證

treasure.intro: 井底淤泥裡,一枚翡翠種子安靜地搏動著,像被人特意沉進最深的地方。
treasure.introEn: In the silt at the well's bottom an emerald seed pulses quietly, as if someone had sunk it, deliberately, as deep as it would go.

choices.text: 把種子貼近沉睡者,聽清他們在念什麼
choices.textEn: Hold the seed near the sleepers and hear their murmuring turn clear

choices.text: 帶上種子,去鐘樓查村史
choices.textEn: Take the seed and go search the bell tower records

nodes.titleEn: The Seed at the Well's Bottom
nodes.narrationEn: The well water is cold as knives. Halfway down, the water turns thick — not with weeds, but with dream. Images burst open that belong to no well: fire climbing the sky, wooden masks turning in slow circles, a child's scream swallowed by a bell. Inside the vision you choke on water, lungs scalding, up and down nearly lost, and only the rope hauls you back. But your fist is clenched around something: a warm seed, emerald, light drifting slowly through its veins, pulsing gently in your palm like a small heart. From the silt you also bring up a few old silver coins, minted ten years ago, every edge melted by fire.

nodes.title: 拼出的歌詞
nodes.directive: 隊伍比對多名沉睡者的呢喃與井中歌聲,拼出童謠全詞,末段點出關鍵:「影子借我藏一藏,十年之後連本還。」記錄童謠是後期安撫夢遊者與勸說瑟芙的關鍵道具,請明確告知玩家已記下全詞。
nodes.narration: 你們挨家蹲在沉睡者床邊,把耳朵貼近那些一張一合的嘴唇。每個人念的都是同一支童謠,卻各念各的段落,像一支被拆散的合唱。你們用炭筆逐句記下、拼接,再和井裡的歌聲對照,終於湊出全詞。前半是哄睡的調子,末段卻陡然一沉:「花開莫怕,火來莫哭,影子借我藏一藏;鐘停十年,名字歸土,十年之後連本還。」寫完最後一個字,滿村沉睡者的呢喃在同一瞬間停了,安靜得像全村都在等你們把這首歌唱給誰聽。

choices.text: 去村長家——歌裡的「影子」也許不是比喻
choices.textEn: Go to the Elder's House — the shadow in the song may be no metaphor

choices.text: 去鐘樓,查「鐘停十年」對得上什麼
choices.textEn: Go to the bell tower and test the line about the bell stopped ten years

nodes.narrationEn: House by house you crouch at the sleepers' bedsides, ears close to the moving lips. Every one of them recites the same rhyme, but each their own scattered verse of it, like a choir taken apart. With charcoal you write the lines down, splice them, check them against the song in the well — and at last the whole rhyme comes together. The first half is a lullaby's tune. The last verse drops like a stone: "Fear not the flowers, cry not at the fire, borrow a shadow and hide it awhile; ten years the bell stops, the name keeps the earth — and in ten years the debt comes home in full." As you write the final word, every murmur in the village stops in the same breath — a silence like the whole of Mossbell waiting to hear you sing this song to someone.

nodes.title: 啞了十年的鐘
nodes.directive: 鐘樓裡的苔鐘完好卻十年未響,鐘舌被人拆走。牆上嵌著村史石碑,十年前那一年的記載被整段鑿去,只有一處人名的位置留著鑿痕,筆畫依稀是「瑟芙」二字。碑角刻著小字:「以忘為祭」。
nodes.narration: 鐘樓的木梯咯吱作響,苔鐘懸在頂層,青銅的鐘身爬滿厚苔,卻擦得出完好的光——不是壞了,是被弄啞的:鐘舌整個被人拆走,吊環上只剩一截斷索。牆上嵌著三塊村史石碑,逐年記事,字跡工整。你們順著年份讀下去,在十年前那一格猛地斷掉:整段記載被鑿去,石面坑坑窪窪,鑿得又深又急,像怕它自己長回來。只有一處人名的位置,鑿痕淺了些,借著斜光還認得出兩個字的輪廓:瑟、芙。碑的最角落補刻著一行小字,刀工和正文不同:「以忘為祭,永守安眠。」

choices.text: 去村長家,查當年是誰下令鑿碑
choices.textEn: Go to the Elder's House and learn who ordered the tablet chiselled

choices.text: 回頭比對沉睡者的呢喃,拼出被鑿去的內容
choices.textEn: Go back to the sleepers' murmurs and piece out what was destroyed

choices.text: 天色不早,回營地作入夜的準備
choices.textEn: The light is failing — return to camp and prepare for nightfall

nodes.narrationEn: The tower stair creaks under you. The Moss Bell hangs at the top, its bronze crusted with moss yet polished sound beneath — not broken, but silenced: the clapper has been taken out whole, only a stub of cut rope left on the ring. Set into the wall are three stone tablets of village record, year by year, the script neat. You read down the years, and at the year ten years past the record snaps off: the whole entry chiselled away, the stone face pitted, the cuts deep and hurried, as if they feared it might grow back. Only in one place, where a name once stood, the chisel went shallower; by slanted light you can still trace the outline of two characters: Sef-fa. In the tablet's lowest corner, in a different hand, a small line has been added: "Forgetting is our offering, that sleep be kept forever."

nodes.title: 村長的影子
nodes.directive: 村長歐德倒在書房沉睡,反常之處:屋裡無光源直射,他的影子卻濃得像潑墨,而且緩慢蠕動,藤蔓對它避而遠之。書房暗格裡有一頁判決書殘片(treasure)。影子暫不可交互,強行攻擊會被彈開,留給中Boss戰。
nodes.narration: 村長歐德伏在書房的案上,睡得和全村一個模樣,唯獨他的影子不對。窗簾拉得死緊,屋裡沒有一縷直射的光,他的影子卻黑得像潑在地板上的墨,濃邊清晰,而且在動——極慢地蠕動,像一袋裝著活物的皮。爬進屋的那股粗藤在離影子三步遠的地方繞了個大彎,寧可翻過書架也不肯沾它半分。你們試著用刀尖挑了挑影子的邊緣,刀身像戳進冷泥,被一股綿密的力道推了回來。案頭的暗格半開著,裡面壓著一頁燒剩的紙。

items.name: 判決書殘頁
items.properties: 十年前的判決殘片:「……林中女子,惑村之罪,處以火祭……」受刑者姓名被墨塗死,告發人簽名處只剩一角「瑪」字

treasure.intro: 暗格裡的殘頁邊緣焦黑,墨塗的名字底下,紙背透出淺淺的筆鋒。
treasure.introEn: The page in the hidden drawer is charred at its edges; beneath the inked-out name, faint strokes show through the back of the paper.

choices.text: 守在村長身邊,等夜色降臨看影子要做什麼
choices.textEn: Keep watch at the elder's side and see what the shadow does at nightfall

choices.text: 帶著殘頁回沉睡者中比對呢喃
choices.textEn: Take the page and match it against the sleepers' murmuring

choices.text: 趕回營地做最後補給
choices.textEn: Hurry back to camp for final supplies

nodes.narrationEn: Elder Odell lies slumped over the desk in his study, sleeping exactly as the village sleeps — but his shadow is wrong. The curtains are drawn tight; not a shaft of direct light enters the room; and still his shadow lies black as spilled ink across the floorboards, edges sharp, and moving — a slow, creeping churn, like a sack with something alive inside. The thick vine that climbed into the house swings three paces wide of the shadow, choosing to scale the bookshelf rather than touch it. You test the shadow's edge with a knife-point: the blade sinks as into cold mud and is pushed back by a dense, patient force. On the desk, a hidden drawer stands half open, a scorched page pressed inside.

nodes.title: 花粉如雪
nodes.directive: 第一幕收束:暮色未至,古樹忽然抖落滿村翡翠花粉,睡意像潮水一樣壓下來,無法抗拒。這是進入共享夢境的瓶頸,兩個選擇都通向夢中,但心態不同。強調:夢裡受的傷,醒來仍在。
nodes.narration: 古樹毫無預兆地抖了一下,滿樹翡翠花同時揚起花粉,綠色的粉塵像一場逆著光的雪,無聲無息落滿整個村子。睡意不是漸漸來的,是壓下來的——膝蓋一軟,眼皮千斤重,連恐懼都被裹上了一層溫水。你們互相掐臂、灌冷水、以刃背拍頰,全都只換來幾息清醒。花粉落在皮膚上並不癢,只是溫柔,溫柔得像有人隔著夢摸你們的頭髮。最後的清醒裡,你們聽見全村的呢喃再次響起,這一次整整齊齊,是那支童謠的第一句。

choices.text: 圍成一圈牽手躺下,約定在夢裡的鐘樓下集合
choices.textEn: Lie down in a circle, hands joined, and agree to meet beneath the dream's bell tower

choices.text: 分喝苦茶再睡,盡量保持夢中神智清明
choices.checkHint: 體質:抵抗花粉,帶著清醒入夢
choices.textEn: Share out the bitter tea before sleeping, and carry what clarity you can into the dream

nodes.narrationEn: Without warning the old tree shudders, and every emerald flower lets go its pollen at once — green dust falling through the light like snow in reverse, settling soundless over the whole village. The sleep does not creep in; it comes down. Knees buckle, eyelids weigh a hundredweight, even fear is wrapped in warm water. You pinch each other's arms, throw cold water, slap cheeks with the flat of a blade — every trick buys a breath or two of clarity, no more. The pollen does not itch where it lands. It is only gentle — gentle like a hand stroking your hair from the far side of a dream. In your last clear moment you hear the whole village murmuring again, in perfect unison now: the first line of the rhyme.

nodes.title: 十年前的村口
nodes.directive: 隊伍在夢中醒來:同一個苔鐘村,但年輕了十年,天色是永恆的黃昏,鐘樓的鐘會響。全村張燈結綵辦「還願祭」,人人臉上是笑,笑得整齊。告知玩家:這是全村共享的夢,重演著十年前那一夜;夢中受創,醒來仍痛。
nodes.narration: 你們在同一個村口醒來,膝蓋下是同一塊泥地,世界卻年輕了十年。門楣的漆是新的,籬笆是直的,天空凝在一種橙綠交錯的黃昏裡,不往前走一分。最陌生的是聲音——鐘在響。苔鐘一聲一聲敲著,混著笑語、鼓點和油炸麵果的香氣。街上掛滿燈籠和翡翠色的紙花,村民們穿著節慶的衣裳往廣場湧,人人臉上都是笑,笑得一模一樣,像同一張臉刻出來的。有個挎籃的婦人擦肩而過,籃裡的木面具晃了晃。她對你們點頭:「還願祭呢,貴客也來討個平安?」

choices.text: 混入人流,前往慶典廣場
choices.textEn: Join the crowd flowing toward the festival square

choices.text: 先登上這座「會響」的鐘樓看清全村
choices.textEn: First climb this bell tower that rings, and take in the whole village

choices.text: 跟上那個獨自逆著人流走的綠髮孩子
choices.checkHint: 隱匿:不驚動人群悄悄尾隨
choices.textEn: Follow the green-haired child walking alone against the crowd

nodes.titleEn: The Gate of Ten Years Gone
nodes.narrationEn: You wake at the same village gate, the same mud beneath your knees, and the world is ten years younger. The paint on the lintels is fresh, the fences stand straight, and the sky has stopped in a dusk of orange braided with green that will not move one minute onward. Strangest of all is the sound — the bell is ringing. The Moss Bell tolls stroke after stroke, mixed with laughter, drums, the smell of fritters in hot oil. Lanterns and emerald paper flowers hang the length of the street, and villagers in festival clothes stream toward the square, every face smiling, smiling identically, as if cut from a single face. A woman with a basket brushes past, wooden masks knocking together inside it. She nods to you: "The Vow-Keeping Festival, honoured guests — come to ask a blessing too?"

nodes.title: 慶典廣場
nodes.directive: 夢中樞紐:廣場擺滿攤位,交易不用錢,用「記憶」——攤主會伸手在你太陽穴前虛按,取走一小段回憶作價。可在此補給、休息、打聽,提醒玩家每筆交易都有代價。廣場中央,柴堆正在一根一根搭起來。
nodes.narration: 慶典廣場比醒著時大了一圈,攤位沿著古樹排成環:糖漬野莓、烤栗、藥湯、磨得雪亮的小刀,樣樣都有。只是沒人收錢。攤主收「記憶」——他們伸出兩指,在客人太陽穴前虛虛一按,捻走一縷發著微光的細絲,客人愣一愣神,拿了貨,笑著走了,笑容比方才淡一分。古樹底下還沒有翡翠花,樹皮上釘著一圈祈願木牌。而廣場正中央,幾個壯年男人正把一根根木柴搭起來,搭得又高又穩,像在準備一場盛大的篝火。孩子們繞著柴堆唱童謠,唱的正是你們記下的那一支。

choices.text: 逛面具攤——慶典裡人人都得有張面具
choices.textEn: Browse the mask stall — at this festival, everyone must have a mask

choices.text: 沿燈籠長街打聽「還願祭」還什麼願
choices.textEn: Work down the lantern street and ask what vow this festival keeps

choices.text: 直接去廣場中央,查那座越搭越高的柴堆
choices.textEn: Go straight to the centre of the square and the ever-taller pyre

nodes.narrationEn: The festival square is a size larger than its waking self, stalls ringing the old tree: candied berries, roast chestnuts, medicine broth, little knives ground bright — everything, and no one takes money. The stallholders take memory. They reach out two fingers, press the air before a customer's temple, and pinch away a faintly glowing thread; the customer blinks, takes their goods, and walks off smiling — a shade fainter than before. Beneath the old tree there are no emerald flowers yet, only a ring of prayer plaques nailed to the bark. And in the very centre of the square, grown men are stacking firewood, log by log, high and steady, as if building toward a great bonfire. Children circle the woodpile singing the rhyme — the very one you wrote down.

nodes.title: 面具攤
nodes.directive: 風險換報酬:攤主是個看不清臉的高個子,面具能讓佩戴者被夢視為「村民」,潛入暢通;代價是一段真實記憶,由玩家自述交出哪段(交出後那段記憶在現實中也會模糊)。買與不買都可,攤主不強求,但會意味深長地說「今晚沒面具的臉,火會記住」。
nodes.narration: 面具攤支在燈影最密的地方,攤主很高,高得不合理,臉始終擰在光照不到的角度。木面具一排排掛著:鹿、貓頭鷹、笑臉、哭臉,眼洞全都空得很深。「一張面具,一段記憶。」攤主的聲音像從水底浮上來,「戴上它,今晚你就是村裡人,火堆前站到最前排也沒人多看一眼。」他伸出兩根過長的手指,在空中輕輕一捻:「隨便哪段都行。初吻、舊仇、亡母的臉。交出來的,醒了也就淡了。」見你們遲疑,他把一張素白面具往前推了推:「不買也行。只是今晚,沒面具的臉,火會記住。」

choices.text: 各交出一段記憶,換上慶典面具
choices.checkHint: 自述交出哪段記憶,由DM裁定其份量
choices.textEn: Each give up a memory, and put on the festival masks

choices.text: 捨不得記憶,空著臉離開攤位
choices.textEn: Keep your memories, and leave the stall bare-faced

nodes.narrationEn: The mask stall stands where the lantern-light is thickest. The stallholder is tall — unreasonably tall — his face always turned at an angle the light cannot reach. Wooden masks hang in rows: stag, owl, laughing face, weeping face, every eyehole deep and empty. "One mask, one memory." His voice rises as if from under water. "Wear it, and tonight you are village-born — stand in the front row at the fire and no one will look at you twice." He extends two overlong fingers and pinches the air, delicately. "Any memory will do. A first kiss. An old grudge. A dead mother's face. What you hand over fades in the waking world too." Seeing you hesitate, he slides a plain white mask an inch closer: "Or don't buy. Only — tonight, the fire remembers the faces that go bare."

nodes.title: 燈籠長街
nodes.directive: 情報支線:長街上的醉漢、貨郎與守燈老人各透露一角真相:還願祭「還」的是十年一度的安眠願;林子深處有一顆「森林的心」,今晚的火就是燒給它看的;日落(夢外的日落)一到,夢會「落地生根」。把死線再次擺到玩家眼前。
nodes.narration: 燈籠長街上人人都樂意和你們搭話,夢裡的嘴比醒著鬆得多。賣酒的醉漢打著嗝說,還願祭十年一回,「還」的是全村的安眠願:「睡得香,忘得乾淨,莊稼都長得好啊。」守燈的老人瞇著眼補了一句:「願是跟林子裡那顆『心』許的。今晚的火,就是燒給它看的——燒個乾淨,它才肯收。」貨郎壓低嗓子,像說什麼吉利話:「聽說外頭的日頭一落,這場夢就落地生根,再也不用醒了。多好。」他笑起來,眼裡一點光都沒有。

choices.text: 去找方才那個逆著人流的綠髮孩子
choices.textEn: Go find the green-haired child who walked against the crowd

choices.text: 去廣場中央的柴堆,看看火要燒誰
choices.textEn: Go to the pyre at the square's centre and see who the fire is for

choices.text: 折回廣場攤位間再補些裝備
choices.textEn: Turn back to the square's stalls and stock up again

nodes.narrationEn: On the long lantern street everyone is glad to talk to you; mouths are looser in a dream than awake. A hiccuping drunk at the wine stall says the Vow-Keeping Festival comes once every ten years, and the vow it keeps is the village's wish for sleep: "Sleep sweet, forget clean, and the crops come up fine." The old lamp-keeper squints and adds his piece: "The vow was made to the 'heart' in the forest. Tonight's fire is burnt for it to see — burn it clean, and only then will it accept." A pedlar drops his voice as if pronouncing a blessing: "They say once the sun outside sets, this dream takes root in the ground, and no one ever need wake. Isn't that fine?" He laughs. There is no light in his eyes at all.

nodes.title: 綠髮的孩子
nodes.directive: 年幼的瑟芙(八九歲,綠髮,懷裡攥著一枚翡翠種子)躲在攤位後,驚惶地找藏東西的地方。她認不出玩家是「外人」,但對善意敏感。她與 soup_kitchen 蠟筆畫上的女孩是同一人,玩家若提及可獲得她的信任。
nodes.narration: 孩子縮在染布攤的布幔後面,綠頭髮用一根草繩草草束著,臉上還帶著沒擦淨的灶灰。她懷裡攥著什麼,攥得指節發白,指縫裡漏出一線翡翠色的光。你們認得這顏色,也認得這張臉:民宅裡那張蠟筆畫上,大樹底下牽著小人的,就是她。她抬頭看見你們,先是一僵,然後急急把發光的手往身後藏,眼睛卻不由自主地往廣場的方向瞟——柴堆的方向。「他們要燒我阿娘。」她的聲音抖得厲害,「阿娘說,把種子藏好,藏到誰都找不到的地方。可我想不出哪裡找不到。」

choices.text: 蹲下來,提起她畫裡的大樹,答應幫她一起藏
choices.textEn: Crouch down, speak of the great tree in her drawing, and promise to help her hide it

choices.text: 不驚動她,遠遠跟著看她把種子藏到哪
choices.checkHint: 隱匿:保持距離不被察覺
choices.textEn: Stay unseen and follow at a distance to see where she hides the seed

choices.text: 先趕去柴堆,阻止「燒阿娘」這件事
choices.textEn: Hurry to the pyre first, and stop the burning of her mother

nodes.narrationEn: The child is tucked behind the dye-stall's hangings, green hair roughly tied with a straw cord, stove-ash not quite wiped from her face. She is clutching something to her chest, clutching it white-knuckled, a thread of emerald light leaking between her fingers. You know that colour. You know this face, too: the girl from the crayon drawing, under the great tree, holding the little figure's hand — it is her. She looks up and sees you, freezes, then whips the glowing hand behind her back, though her eyes dart helplessly toward the square — toward the pyre. "They're going to burn my mama." Her voice shakes badly. "Mama said hide the seed, hide it where no one can ever find it. But I can't think of anywhere no one finds."

nodes.title: 藏進影子裡
nodes.directive: 關鍵伏筆:年幼瑟芙在巷口撞見巡視的年輕村長歐德,情急之下把種子按進歐德拖在牆上的影子裡——種子沒入影中,消失無蹤。歐德毫無所覺地走了。呼應醒世裡村長那攤異常的濃影。務必把「種子入影」演清楚。
nodes.narration: 小瑟芙貓著腰在巷子裡鑽,試了雞窩、柴垛、瓦縫,都搖頭。巷口忽然傳來腳步聲——年輕十歲的村長歐德提著燈巡街,燈火把他的影子長長地拖在牆上。孩子躲閃不及,情急之下做了一件你們誰都沒想到的事:她轉身把攥著種子的小手,按進了牆上那片影子裡。像按進一汪水。翡翠光在影子裡一閃,沉了下去,消失得乾乾淨淨。歐德打著哈欠走過巷口,渾然不覺自己的影子重了一分。小瑟芙攤開空空的手心,又哭又笑地小聲說:「影子借我藏一藏……阿娘教的。」

choices.text: 跟上年輕村長歐德,盯住那片藏著種子的影子
choices.textEn: Follow young Elder Odell, and keep your eyes on the shadow holding the seed

choices.text: 先送孩子離開,再趕往柴堆
choices.textEn: See the child to safety first, then make for the pyre

choices.text: 在暗巷多留片刻,確認沒人看見這一幕
choices.textEn: Linger in the dark lane a moment, and make sure no one saw

nodes.narrationEn: Little Seffa threads the lanes at a crouch, trying the hen-coop, the woodpile, the gap under the tiles, shaking her head at each. Then footsteps at the lane's mouth — Elder Odell, ten years younger, on his rounds with a lantern, his shadow stretched long up the wall. The child has nowhere to dodge, and in her panic does the one thing none of you expects: she turns and presses the small fist holding the seed into the shadow on the wall. Like pressing it into water. Emerald light flashes once inside the shadow, sinks, and is gone without a trace. Odell walks past the lane-mouth yawning, never feeling his shadow grow one measure heavier. Little Seffa opens her empty palm, and whispers, laughing and crying at once: "Borrow a shadow and hide it awhile… Mama taught me."

nodes.title: 村長的帳幕
nodes.directive: 潛入節:年輕歐德回到廣場邊的主持帳,案上攤著今晚的判決書原件與火祭流程。戴面具者可大方靠近,無面具者需要隱匿。偷到判決書是重要證物;驚動守衛或直接質問會引來夢境獵犬——夢的免疫系統。
nodes.narration: 歐德鑽進廣場邊的主持帳,帳簾沒拉嚴。從縫隙望進去,案上壓著一份墨跡未乾的文書,朱紅的村長印就擺在手邊。借著燈影能認出擡頭幾個字:判決。這就是十年後被燒剩一角、名字被墨塗死的那份——此刻它還完完整整躺在案上,受刑人的名字、告發人的簽名,一字不缺。帳外兩個執事來回踱步,見了戴面具的村民只是點頭,對生面孔卻盯得很緊。更遠處的燈影裡,似乎有什麼四足的東西貼著地面走,燈光掃過去,又什麼都沒有。

choices.text: 潛入帳中,偷出那份判決書原件
choices.checkHint: 隱匿:避開執事的目光取走文書
choices.textEn: Slip into the tent and steal the original verdict

choices.text: 風險太大,退回廣場人流裡
choices.textEn: Too dangerous — fall back into the crowd on the square

choices.text: 掀簾而入,當面質問歐德要燒的是誰
choices.textEn: Throw the flap aside and demand of Odell, face to face, who burns tonight

nodes.narrationEn: Odell ducks into the presiding tent at the square's edge; the flap does not quite close. Through the gap you see a document spread on the desk, its ink still wet, the elder's vermilion seal ready at hand. By lantern-light you can make out the heading: Verdict. This is the page that ten years on will survive as a burnt corner with its names inked out — and here it lies whole, the condemned's name, the accuser's signature, not a stroke missing. Outside, two stewards pace back and forth, nodding at masked villagers, watching unfamiliar faces hard. Farther off in the lantern-shadow, something four-legged seems to move low along the ground — the light sweeps across, and there is nothing there.

nodes.title: 判決原件
nodes.directive: 玩家取得判決書原件:受刑人「瑟芙之母,林中藥婦艾溫」,罪名「以妖術惑村」,告發人簽名完整——「瑪珂」。與醒世的殘頁互為表裡。取得瞬間,整個夢輕微地「顫」了一下,遠處傳來犬吠。
nodes.narration: 文書入手的瞬間,指尖一陣發麻,整個夢境極輕地顫了一下,像水面被人碰了一指。你們展開它,一字一字讀:受刑人,林中藥婦艾溫,攜女瑟芙居於村東林緣;罪名,以妖術惑村,致三年歉收;處置,火祭還願,以安林心。落款是村長歐德的朱印,而告發人一欄的簽名工整清晰,一撇一捺都不含糊——瑪珂。十年後賣你們苦茶、一問三不知的那位藥婆。帳外的黃昏深處,遠遠傳來第一聲犬吠,拖得很長,不像狗,倒像某種東西在學狗叫。

items.name: 判決書原件
items.properties: 十年前火祭的完整判決:受刑人艾溫、告發人瑪珂、主判歐德俱全;喚醒村民直面真相時的關鍵鐵證

treasure.intro: 墨跡未乾的判決書上,每一個十年後被抹去的名字,此刻都清清楚楚。
treasure.introEn: On the verdict, its ink not yet dry, every name that ten years will erase stands out clear and whole.

choices.text: 揣好文書,趕往柴堆,處刑快開始了
choices.textEn: Tuck the verdict away and make for the pyre — the execution is close

choices.text: 犬吠漸近,先退回廣場人流裡避風頭
choices.textEn: The baying draws nearer — melt back into the crowd first

nodes.narrationEn: The moment the document is in your hands your fingertips prickle, and the whole dream shivers, very slightly, like a water-surface touched by one finger. You unfold it and read, word by word: the condemned, Aewen, herb-wife of the wood, dwelling with her daughter Seffa at the village's eastern treeline; the charge, bewitching the village by sorcery, to the ruin of three harvests; the sentence, fire-offering in payment of the vow, to appease the Forest Heart. Beneath sits Elder Odell's vermilion seal — and in the accuser's line, a signature neat and unhesitating, every stroke sure: Marko. The herb-woman who, ten years on, sold you bitter tea and knew nothing of anything. Somewhere deep in the tent-lit dusk comes the first bay of a hound — long, drawn out, not quite a dog. More like something learning to sound like one.

nodes.title: 夢境獵犬
nodes.directive: 夢的免疫系統嗅出「醒著的氣味」:三頭由燈影與犬吠拼成的獵犬圍上來,眼窩是空的,叫聲從腹腔裡發出。強調它們追的是「清醒」,戴面具或裝睡無法完全騙過。戰鬥後傷口帶著淡綠色,提示醒來仍會痛。
nodes.narration: 犬吠聲圍了上來,三個方向,速度快得不像腿跑出來的。它們從燈影裡「長」出來——影子先到,獸身後到,三頭獵犬的輪廓由重疊的燈影和犬吠拼成,眼窩空空,叫聲不從喉嚨、而從整個腹腔裡嗡出來。街上的村民恍若未聞,提燈的照樣提燈,唱謠的照樣唱謠。最前頭那頭犬把鼻尖貼近地面,深深一嗅,再擡頭時,空眼窩正正對準你們:它嗅到的不是氣味,是你們身上那點「醒著」。獠牙落下的地方,夢和皮肉一樣會破。

combat.intro: 三頭由燈影拼成的獵犬自街角包抄而來,空空的眼窩鎖定你們身上「醒著」的氣味。
combat.introEn: Three hounds pieced together from lantern-shadow close in from the street corners, empty sockets locked on the scent of waking about you.

choices.text: 檢視傷口——齒痕泛著淡綠,痛得真實
choices.textEn: Examine your wounds — the bite-marks glow faint green, and the pain is real

choices.text: 顧不上傷,直奔柴堆廣場
choices.textEn: Never mind the wounds — run straight for the pyre square

nodes.narrationEn: The baying closes from three directions, faster than legs could carry it. They grow out of the lantern-shadows — shadow arriving first, beast after: three hounds pieced together from overlapping lamplight and the sound of barking, eye-sockets empty, the baying humming not from their throats but from the whole barrel of their bodies. The villagers in the street hear nothing; the lantern-bearers keep bearing lanterns, the singers keep singing. The lead hound puts its nose to the ground and draws one deep breath, and when its head lifts, the empty sockets fix squarely on you: what it has caught is not a scent, but the waking on you. Where its fangs land, dream tears as easily as skin.

nodes.title: 夢傷不夢
nodes.directive: 受傷的隊員被痛楚短暫彈出夢境,在真實的苔鐘村驚醒數息:天色已近黃昏,藤蔓比之前更粗,身上的齒痕真實流血。再度沉入夢中前,讓玩家親眼確認「夢傷即真傷」與時限的逼近。這是夢內外交錯的示範節點。
nodes.narration: 痛把人從夢裡整個掀了出來。傷得最重的那位在現實的泥地上驚醒,胸口劇烈起伏——真實的苔鐘村,真實的黃昏前的天色,橙光已經斜得很低了。低頭看,夢裡被咬的位置,布料破著,齒痕在,血也在,一滴一滴滲進苔蘚裡。廣場上的藤蔓比入睡前粗了一圈,已經爬上了各家的屋脊,把整個村子往森林的方向輕輕地「收」。睡意幾乎立刻又漫上來,沉重不容拒絕。閉眼前的最後一瞬,你們記住了兩件事:夢裡的傷是真的,和,留給你們的天光不多了。

choices.text: 咬牙沉回夢中,與同伴在慶典會合
choices.textEn: Grit your teeth, sink back into the dream, and rejoin the others at the festival

choices.text: 沉回夢中,直奔柴堆不再繞路
choices.textEn: Sink back into the dream and go straight for the pyre, no more detours

nodes.narrationEn: Pain flings one of you clean out of the dream. The worst-wounded wakes on real mud, chest heaving — the real Mossbell, the real sky before dusk, the orange light already slanting low. Look down: where the dream bit, the cloth is torn, the tooth-marks are there, and so is the blood, seeping drop by drop into the moss. The vines on the square have thickened by a girth since you slept; they have climbed onto every roof-ridge, gathering the whole village gently toward the forest. Sleep floods back almost at once, heavy, brooking no refusal. In the last instant before your eyes close, you fix two things in memory: the wounds taken in dreams are real — and there is very little daylight left.

nodes.title: 柴堆與囚車
nodes.directive: 柴堆已搭至一人半高,囚車押來被五花大綁的綠髮婦人艾溫——瑟芙的母親。她平靜得反常,目光在人群裡搜尋女兒。村民們領到面具,笑容依舊整齊。氣氛從節慶滑向儀式,鼓點變成單調的重拍。
nodes.narration: 柴堆已經搭到一人半高,浸過油的木頭在黃昏裡發著暗光。鼓點不知何時變了,從節慶的碎拍變成單調的重擊,一下,一下,敲在每個人的心口上。囚車從長街那頭壓著鼓點駛來,車裡綁著一個綠髮的婦人,粗麻繩五花大綁,勒進肩肉。她不喊冤,也不掙,只是安安靜靜地用目光在人群裡一寸一寸地找——找一顆綠色的小腦袋。執事們沿街發放木面具,村民們一個接一個把笑臉藏進木頭後面。有人往你們手裡也塞了一張。木頭冰涼。鼓點,又重了一拍。

choices.text: 擠到柴堆最前排,看清整場儀式
choices.textEn: Push through to the front row and see the whole rite clearly

choices.text: 混入人群,聽村民議論是誰告發的她
choices.textEn: Stay in the crowd and listen for who informed against her

choices.text: 退回廣場攤位,備妥再來
choices.textEn: Fall back to the square's stalls, and come back prepared

nodes.titleEn: The Pyre and the Prison Cart
nodes.narrationEn: The pyre has risen half again a man's height, oil-soaked wood glowing dully in the dusk. At some point the drums changed — from festival patter to a single flat stroke, one, one, landing on every chest in the square. The prison cart comes down the long street in time with it, and in the cart, bound with coarse rope that bites into her shoulders, rides a green-haired woman. She does not cry her innocence. She does not struggle. She only searches the crowd with her eyes, quietly, inch by inch — searching for a small green head. Stewards move along the street handing out wooden masks, and one by one the villagers tuck their smiles away behind the wood. Someone presses a mask into your hands as well. The wood is cold. The drum lands, one stroke heavier.

nodes.title: 告發者的臉
nodes.directive: 人群議論拼出真相的一角:告發艾溫的是年輕的藥婆瑪珂——兩人曾同行醫,艾溫的藥更靈,搶了她的生計;歉收需要一個罪人,她遞了名字。玩家在人群前排看見年輕十歲的瑪珂,攥著面具,不敢戴上,也不敢看囚車。
nodes.narration: 人群裡的耳語比鼓點更密。「聽說是瑪珂遞的名字。」「可不是,同是採藥的,艾溫的藥靈,搶了她多少生計。」「歉收總得有個緣故,有個人頂……」聲音壓得低,卻誰都樂意再傳一遍。你們順著幾道目光望去,在前排看見了年輕十歲的瑪珂:她攥著一張木面具,攥得指節發白,始終沒有戴上,也始終沒有朝囚車看過一眼。囚車上的艾溫倒是找到了她,隔著人群靜靜看著,不怒,不怨,只是看。瑪珂的肩膀一點一點地垮下去,像被那道目光壓進地裡。

choices.text: 站上前排,把整場儀式看到底
choices.textEn: Take the front row and see the rite through to its end

choices.text: 退開人群,回廣場整備
choices.textEn: Draw back from the crowd and regroup on the square

nodes.narrationEn: The whispers in the crowd run thicker than the drumbeats. "They say it was Marko gave the name." "Of course — both of them herb-gatherers, and Aewen's cures worked. Took the living from her mouth." "A failed harvest wants a reason. Wants someone to answer for it…" The voices stay low, but everyone is glad to pass them on once more. You follow the glances to the front row and find Marko, ten years younger: clutching a wooden mask, clutching it white-knuckled, never putting it on, never once looking at the cart. Aewen has found her, though. Across the crowd she watches her, steadily — no anger, no blame, only watching. And Marko's shoulders sink, little by little, as if that gaze were pressing her into the earth.

nodes.title: 火刑重演
nodes.directive: 第二幕瓶頸:火把落下,處刑開始重演,全村戴面具合唱童謠。挺身干預或斥責會撕破夢的秩序,引來面具眾圍攻;隱忍默記則能看完全程,火熄後可趁亂取遺物。無論如何,小瑟芙的尖叫都會刺穿合唱,成為玩家忘不掉的一筆。
nodes.narration: 歐德登上高臺,展開判決,聲音平穩得像唸豐收的帳目。艾溫被縛上柴堆,她最後環顧一圈,忽然對著人群某個角落極輕地搖了搖頭:別出來。火把擲落,油浸的木頭轟地竄起火舌。全村在同一瞬間戴上面具,童謠齊聲響起,溫柔的調子被幾百張木頭臉唱得像喪鐘:「花開莫怕,火來莫哭……」火光裡,一聲孩子的尖叫刺穿合唱,又被更響的歌聲按了下去。你們站在人群裡,手裡的木面具冰涼。戴,或不戴;忍,或不忍——夢在等你們表態。

choices.text: 衝上柴堆救人,哪怕撕破這場夢
choices.textEn: Charge the pyre and cut her free, though it tear the dream apart

choices.text: 按住怒火,把儀式每個細節默記進骨頭裡
choices.checkHint: 意志:在合唱與火光中保持神智
choices.textEn: Choke down your rage, and carve every detail of the rite into your bones

choices.text: 摘下面具,當眾怒斥全村的沉默
choices.textEn: Pull off the mask and curse the village's silence to its face

nodes.narrationEn: Odell mounts the platform and unrolls the verdict, his voice as level as a man reading harvest accounts. Aewen is bound to the pyre. She looks around one last time, and toward a certain corner of the crowd gives the smallest shake of her head: stay hidden. The torch falls; the oiled wood roars into flame. In the same instant the whole village puts on its masks, and the rhyme rises in chorus — the gentle tune sung by hundreds of wooden faces until it tolls like a funeral bell: "Fear not the flowers, cry not at the fire…" Somewhere in the blaze a child's scream tears through the chorus, and is pressed down under louder song. You stand in the crowd, the wooden masks cold in your hands. To wear it, or not; to bear it, or not — the dream is waiting for your answer.

nodes.title: 面具眾圍攻
nodes.directive: 夢的秩序被撕破:合唱聲走調成低鳴,面具眾一排排轉頭,像一具身體的無數張臉,持農具與火把圍攻玩家。他們是夢的提線人偶,擊倒不會傷及真身,但數量帶來壓迫感。戰後夢境短暫「跳幀」,玩家被拋向火熄後的柴堆或彈醒。
nodes.narration: 合唱在同一個音上卡住,走調成一片低鳴。幾百張木面具一排接一排地轉過來,動作齊得像一具身體長出的無數張臉。「外人。」低鳴裡滾出這兩個字,不知出自哪張嘴,或者出自每一張。最前排的村民擡起手裡的東西——鐮刀、連枷、燒著的火把,腳步錯落地圍攏,面具的空眼洞映著火光。你們認得其中幾件衣裳:灶邊沉睡的父親,井邊的婦人。夢在用他們的手打你們,而他們的真身正在十年後的村子裡,替這場夢皺著眉。

combat.intro: 幾百張木面具齊齊轉向你們,前排的鐮刀與火把壓著走調的童謠圍攏上來。
combat.introEn: Hundreds of wooden masks turn on you as one; sickles and torches close in from the front ranks under a rhyme gone out of tune.

choices.text: 殺開一條路,衝向火熄後的柴堆殘燼
choices.textEn: Cut a path through, to the pyre's embers where the fire has died

choices.text: 且戰且退,任夢境把你們彈醒
choices.textEn: Fight a retreat, and let the dream throw you back into waking

nodes.narrationEn: The chorus jams on a single note and slides into a low drone. Row upon row, hundreds of wooden masks turn — one motion, countless faces on a single body. "Outsiders." The word rolls out of the drone, from no mouth you can name, or from every one. The front ranks raise what their hands hold — sickles, flails, burning torches — and close in out of step, firelight swimming in the empty eyeholes. You know some of those clothes: the father asleep at his stove, the woman by the well. The dream is striking at you with their hands, while their true bodies lie ten years away in the village, frowning on the dream's behalf.

nodes.title: 火中遺物
nodes.directive: 風險換報酬:火熄後的柴堆餘燼仍帶著夢火的灼熱,伸手翻找會被燙傷且醒後傷仍在;深處埋著艾溫的木護符(未被燒毀,與童謠共鳴)與她臨終望向女兒方向的一縷「目光」凝成的琥珀。取得護符者在終戰勸說時有分量。
nodes.narration: 夢在火熄之後安靜下來,面具眾像退潮一樣散盡,廣場只剩焦黑的柴堆與貼著地面打轉的灰。餘燼看著暗了,伸手進去才知道夢火不講道理——灼痛順著指尖竄上手肘,你們咬著牙在灰裡翻,燙出的水泡是真的,醒來也消不掉的那種。灰堆深處,指尖碰到一塊完好的木頭:一枚巴掌大的木護符,刻著大樹與搖籃,火燎的痕跡繞著它轉了一圈,竟沒燒進去分毫。護符底下壓著一小塊琥珀色的凝晶,湊近了看,裡面封著一道望向遠處的、極溫柔的目光。

items.name: 艾溫的木護符
items.properties: 刻著大樹與搖籃,夢火燒不毀;貼近時童謠的調子會自己浮上心頭,是艾溫留給瑟芙的信物

items.name: 凝目琥珀
items.properties: 封著艾溫臨終望向女兒的一道目光;於瑟芙面前出示時,勝過千言萬語

treasure.intro: 餘燼深處,一枚木護符完好如初,像被那場火刻意繞了過去。
treasure.introEn: Deep in the embers a wooden charm lies whole and unburnt, as if the fire had gone deliberately around it.

choices.text: 帶著遺物退出夢境,身上的燙傷仍在作痛
choices.textEn: Carry the relics out of the dream, the scalds still aching

choices.text: 趁夢未合攏,再去那座會響的鐘樓一趟
choices.textEn: Before the dream closes over, go once more to the bell tower that rings

nodes.narrationEn: The dream goes quiet after the fire dies. The masked throng ebbs away like a tide, and the square is left to the blackened pyre and ash turning in low circles along the ground. The embers look dark; only a hand thrust in learns that dream-fire keeps no rules — the scald runs from fingertip to elbow, and you dig through the ash with your teeth set, raising blisters that are real, the kind waking will not take away. Deep in the ash your fingers find whole wood: a palm-sized wooden charm carved with a great tree and a cradle, the fire's scorch circling right around it without biting in. Beneath the charm lies a small piece of amber-coloured crystal — hold it close, and sealed inside is a gaze turned toward something far away, and very gentle.

nodes.title: 會響的鐘
nodes.directive: 夢中鐘樓的苔鐘完好,鐘舌尚在。敲響它,鐘聲能把夢短暫震薄,井邊沉睡的婦人在現實中醒來幾息、留下一句證言(「是我們求樹忘掉的」);代價是鐘聲等於向整個夢通報位置。這是風險換報酬支線,也回收「鐘停十年」。
nodes.narration: 夢裡的鐘樓和醒世那座一磚不差,唯一的分別懸在頭頂:鐘舌還在,黃銅磨得發亮,繩索垂到手邊,像一句就等人開口的話。從鐘樓往下望,慶典的燈火鋪滿全村,火刑臺的餘燼在正中央燒出一個黑點。你們記得醒世的碑文:以忘為祭。也記得童謠:鐘停十年,名字歸土。這口鐘停與不停,似乎正是「忘」與「記」的界線。繩索粗糙,懸在手邊。敲,鐘聲會替你們把夢震薄一線;但整個夢,也會在同一瞬聽見你們在哪。

choices.text: 敲響苔鐘,哪怕全夢都聽見
choices.checkHint: 力量:拉動十年未動的鐘舌
choices.textEn: Ring the Moss Bell, though the whole dream hear it

choices.text: 不敲,循梯而下混回人流
choices.textEn: Leave it silent — take the stairs down and melt into the crowd

nodes.narrationEn: The dream's bell tower matches the waking one brick for brick; the single difference hangs overhead. The clapper is still there, its brass rubbed bright, the rope trailing down to hand-height like a sentence waiting for a mouth. From the tower you look down on festival lights spread over the whole village, the pyre's embers burning a black point at its centre. You remember the waking tablet: forgetting is our offering. And the rhyme: ten years the bell stops, the name keeps the earth. Whether this bell stops or rings seems to be the very line between forgetting and remembering. The rope is rough, hanging within reach. Ring it, and the sound will thin the dream by one layer — and in the same stroke, the whole dream will know exactly where you are.

nodes.title: 黃昏將盡
nodes.directive: 第三幕瓶頸兼中場喘息:隊伍在現實中醒來,日輪已貼近山脊,藤蔓爬滿全村屋脊。營地是最後的補給與休息機會,巴魯催促拔營並可受託帶走沉睡的孩童。瑪珂坐在貨車邊,見到玩家手中的證物(判決書或殘頁)臉色慘白。
nodes.narration: 這一次,是夢把你們放了出來。醒來的村莊安靜得像屏著呼吸:日輪已經貼上西邊的山脊,橙光橫著掃過來,把藤蔓的影子拉得極長——藤已經爬滿了每一戶的屋脊,整個村子被綠色的網溫柔地兜著,朝森林的方向繃緊。巴魯在營地裡來回踱步,車轅都套好了:「日頭一落我就走!要捎什麼、買什麼,最後一趟!」瑪珂還坐在她的貨車邊。她看見你們走來,目光落在你們懷裡露出一角的文書上,臉上的血色一寸一寸退了下去。

choices.text: 拿出判決書,當面問瑪珂那個簽名
choices.textEn: Take out the verdict and ask Marko about that signature to her face

choices.text: 時間不多,補給完立刻循主藤入林
choices.textEn: Time is short — resupply and follow the great vine into the forest at once

choices.text: 託巴魯載走幾個沉睡的孩子再動身
choices.textEn: Ask Balu to carry away some of the sleeping children before you set out

nodes.narrationEn: This time, it is the dream that lets you go. The village you wake to is quiet as a held breath: the sun's disc already rests on the western ridge, orange light raking sideways, dragging the vines' shadows long — they have covered every roof-ridge now, the whole village cradled in a green net drawing gently taut toward the forest. Balu paces the camp, his wagon already in harness: "The moment the sun drops, I'm gone! Anything to carry, anything to buy — last chance!" Marko is still sitting by her wagon. She sees you coming, and her gaze finds the corner of the document showing at your breast — and the colour drains from her face, inch by inch.

nodes.title: 瑪珂的自白
nodes.directive: 伏筆回收:瑪珂認下告發之罪——嫉妒、歉收、全村要一個罪人,她遞了名字,十年來夜夜熬苦茶不敢睡熟。她交出「初雪之鈴」(艾溫舊物,搖動可讓瑟芙聽見母親的聲音)並求玩家帶話:「別替我求情,把我的名字一起說出去。」給予終戰關鍵道具與勸說籌碼。
nodes.narration: 瑪珂盯著那個簽名看了很久,久到日光又斜了一分。「是我寫的。」她終於開口,聲音平得可怕,「她的藥比我的靈,她們母女不進村也活得好。那年歉收,村裡要一個緣故……我就給了一個。」她從懷裡摸出一只小小的銀鈴,鈴身刻著雪花,擦得發亮:「艾溫的東西,她們家門口掛的。搖一搖,那孩子聽得見她娘的聲音。」她把鈴塞進你們手裡,手抖得厲害,話卻一字一頓:「進了林子,別替我求情。把真相說出去的時候——把我的名字,一起說出去。」

choices.text: 收下銀鈴,趕在日落前循主藤入林
choices.textEn: Take the silver bell, and follow the great vine into the forest before sundown

choices.text: 先回營地做最後整備再出發
choices.textEn: Return to camp for one last preparation before setting out

nodes.narrationEn: Marko stares at the signature a long time — long enough for the light to slant another degree. "I wrote it." When she speaks at last her voice is terribly level. "Her cures worked better than mine. She and the girl lived well without ever setting foot in the village. That year the harvest failed, and the village wanted a reason… so I gave it one." From inside her coat she brings out a little silver bell, snowflakes engraved on its skirt, polished bright. "Aewen's. It hung at their door. Ring it, and the child will hear her mother's voice." She presses the bell into your hands, her own shaking hard, but the words come one at a time, steady: "In the forest — don't plead for me. When you tell the truth aloud, tell my name with it."

nodes.title: 林緣拔營前
nodes.directive: 最後的城鎮節點:巴魯的貨車已套好,最後一輪買賣,傷藥火把半價急售;可短暫休整恢復。若玩家先前託付孩童,描寫車廂裡並排睡著的孩子。營火之外,林口的綠霧正在變濃,主藤上的翡翠光一節一節往森林深處傳。
nodes.narration: 營地只剩最後一堆火。巴魯把貨箱一口氣搬上車板,回頭朝你們一攤手:「急售!傷藥半價,火把白送,繩子挑最好的拿——就當我給這村子積德。」車廂裡鋪了厚毯,幾個沉睡的孩子並排躺著,呼吸勻淨,懷裡那張蠟筆畫被誰細心地掖在最小那個的臂彎裡。你們就著營火吃了幾口熱食,把傷口重新裹緊。林口的綠霧濃得成了牆,主藤靜靜臥在霧裡,藤身上的翡翠光一節、一節、一節地往森林深處傳,像有誰在裡面數著什麼,等著什麼。

choices.text: 整備完畢,沿主藤正面入林
choices.textEn: Ready at last — enter the forest along the great vine

choices.text: 走獵人舊道,從高處藤橋抄近路
choices.textEn: Take the hunters' old trail and cut across by the high vine bridge

nodes.titleEn: Breaking Camp at the Wood's Edge
nodes.narrationEn: One fire is left in the camp. Balu heaves the last crates onto the wagon bed in a single burst, then turns and spreads his hands at you: "Fire sale! Salves half price, torches free, take the best of the rope — call it my good deed for this village." The wagon bed is spread with thick blankets, sleeping children laid out in a row, their breathing clean and even; someone has tucked the crayon drawing carefully into the crook of the smallest one's arm. You eat a few mouthfuls of hot food by the fire and bind your wounds afresh. At the treeline the green mist has thickened into a wall. The great vine lies quiet in the mist, and the emerald light passes along it, joint by joint by joint, into the deep forest — as if something in there were counting, and waiting.

nodes.title: 循藤入林
nodes.directive: 森林內部濕綠幽深,花香與腐味交替,主藤如血管一路加粗,林中隱約傳來鐘聲與童謠交疊的迴響。給出三條路線:正面荊棘拱門(戰)、高處藤橋(險)、以及一座亮著燈的獵屋(支線)。日落壓力持續存在。
nodes.narration: 林子裡沒有路,只有藤。主藤在腳邊一路加粗,粗到後來像臥著一條發光的巨蟒,藤身的翡翠光一明一滅,節奏竟和你們的心跳慢慢對上了。霧是綠的,吸進肺裡帶著花香,呼出來卻沾著一絲腐味,像這座森林一邊盛開一邊爛熟。極遠處有鐘聲,和童謠的調子疊在一起,一下一下,從樹根底下滲上來。前方岔成三途:主藤鑽進一道荊棘絞成的拱門;左手高處,幾股藤在樹冠間絞成一座懸橋;右手深處,竟有一座獵屋亮著昏黃的燈。

choices.text: 走正面,穿過那道荊棘拱門
choices.textEn: Take the way ahead, through the arch of thorns

choices.text: 攀上樹冠,走藤橋抄近路
choices.textEn: Climb to the canopy and cross by the vine bridge

choices.text: 繞去那座亮燈的獵屋看看
choices.textEn: Turn aside to the lamplit hunting lodge

nodes.titleEn: Into the Forest by the Vine
nodes.narrationEn: There is no road in the forest, only the vine. It thickens beside you as you walk, until it lies like a glowing serpent at rest, the emerald light along its body waxing and waning — and slowly its rhythm finds your heartbeat, and keeps it. The mist is green; breathed in, it tastes of flowers, breathed out, it leaves a trace of rot, as if this forest were blooming and going overripe in the same hour. Very far off a bell tolls, folded into the rhyme's tune, one stroke at a time, seeping up from under the roots. Ahead the way splits three: the great vine dives through an archway twisted out of thorns; to the left, high up, several strands weave a hanging bridge through the canopy; and to the right, deep between the trunks, a hunting lodge stands with a dim lamp burning.

nodes.title: 樹冠藤橋
nodes.directive: 風險換報酬:藤橋懸在十餘丈高的樹冠間,直通森林內圈,能繞開荊棘拱門;但藤身濕滑且會呼吸般起伏,失足者墜落受創(醒夢皆痛)。通過檢定則俯瞰全局:看見森心巨樹的輪廓與環樹而行的夢遊村民。
nodes.narration: 藤橋比看上去更活。踏上去的第一步,整座橋輕輕一沉,像踩上一條正在呼吸的脊背;藤皮濕滑,綠霧從腳下的深淵裡緩緩上湧,十餘丈下的樹影黑得沒有底。橋走到一半,整條藤忽然不安地蠕動起來,你們只能貼身伏低,指節摳進藤皮,任它把你們馱著晃過最險的一段。從樹冠的缺口望出去,森林的中央矗著一棵吞掉半個天空的巨樹,樹身纏滿發光的藤,樹根之間,一圈小小的人影正繞著樹底緩緩地走,一圈,又一圈。

choices.text: 壓低身子快速通過,直抵巨樹外圈
choices.checkHint: 敏捷:在濕滑起伏的藤身上保持平衡
choices.textEn: Keep low and cross fast, straight to the great tree's outer ring

choices.text: 橋太活了,折返走荊棘拱門
choices.textEn: The bridge is too alive — turn back and take the thorn arch

nodes.narrationEn: The bridge is more alive than it looks. At your first step the whole span settles softly, like treading on a breathing spine; the vine's skin is slick, green mist welling slowly up out of the gulf below, and the tree-shadows a hundred feet down are black without bottom. Halfway across, the whole vine begins to stir uneasily, and there is nothing for it but to press yourselves flat, knuckles dug into the bark-skin, and let it carry you swaying across the worst of the span. Through a gap in the canopy you see it: at the forest's centre a tree that swallows half the sky, its trunk wound in glowing vines — and between its roots, a ring of small figures walking slowly around the base. Around, and around.

nodes.title: 獵屋地窖
nodes.directive: 風險換報酬支線:獵屋主人早已沉睡,燈是藤蔓借他的手點的。地窖裡兩具藤繭破開,繭衛撲出護巢;擊敗後可取獵人遺留的銀剪與安神苔膏(treasure)。銀剪對藤蔓造物格外鋒利,為終戰添籌碼。
nodes.narration: 獵屋的門虛掩著,老獵人趴在桌上沉睡,油燈就亮在他手邊——燈芯上纏著一絲細藤,火苗一跳一跳,是藤蔓借著他的手在替森林點燈。屋角的地窖門大敞,濕冷的綠氣往上冒。你們舉火下梯,窖裡懸著三隻人高的藤繭,表皮半透,裡面蜷著模糊的輪廓。火光靠近的一瞬,兩隻繭同時繃裂,繭衣翻捲成細密的鞭藤,護著最裡面那隻還在孕育的繭,朝你們兜頭抽來。牆邊的工具架上,一把銀亮的大剪在火光裡閃了閃。

combat.intro: 兩隻藤繭轟然繃裂,繭衣翻捲成鞭,護著窖底最後一隻繭向你們抽來。
combat.introEn: Two vine cocoons burst with a crack, their casings whipping into lashes, striking out at you in defence of the last cocoon at the cellar's rear.

items.name: 獵人的銀剪
items.properties: 純銀鍛造;對藤蔓與植物造物的傷害額外+2,剪斷的藤不會再生

items.name: 安神苔膏
items.properties: 塗抹傷口可穩定心神,恢復少量生命;夢中使用同樣有效

treasure.intro: 工具架上,獵人的銀剪仍然雪亮,剪口沾著一層乾涸的綠色汁液。
treasure.introEn: On the tool rack the hunter's silver shears are still bright as snow, their blades crusted with a film of dried green sap.

choices.text: 帶上銀剪,回岔路走荊棘拱門
choices.textEn: Take the silver shears, and return to the fork for the thorn arch

choices.text: 從獵屋後坡攀上樹冠藤橋
choices.textEn: Climb from the slope behind the lodge up to the canopy bridge

nodes.narrationEn: The lodge door stands ajar. The old hunter sleeps face-down at his table, an oil lamp burning at his hand — a fine tendril wound around the wick, the flame jumping: the vines are keeping the forest's lamp lit with his hand. In the corner the cellar door gapes, cold green air rising out of it. You carry fire down the ladder and find three man-high cocoons of woven vine hanging in the dark, their skins half-translucent, blurred shapes curled inside. The instant the light nears, two cocoons split as one, their casings whipping loose into fine lashing tendrils that guard the innermost cocoon — the one still growing — and come whistling down at your heads. On the tool rack against the wall, a great silver shear glints in the firelight.

nodes.title: 荊棘拱門
nodes.directive: 森林內圈的關口:荊棘絞成的拱門下盤踞著兩尊荊棘守衛,由斷藤與獸骨拼成,行動遲緩但力大。持面具或護符者可描述守衛遲疑的瞬間,但它們最終仍會動手——森林此刻只信自己人。戰後拱門枯萎讓路。
nodes.narration: 荊棘拱門比人高出三倍,棘刺上掛著幾縷褪色的布條,看年頭,像是十年來誤入林子的人留下的。拱門下的陰影裡,兩堆「枯枝」緩緩站了起來——斷藤與獸骨絞成的守衛,肩胛是鹿的顱骨,指節是拗斷的棘條,關節轉動時發出濕木擰絞的呻吟。你們亮出護符也好、面具也罷,那兩顆空洞的顱骨確實遲疑了一瞬,隨即還是沉沉地擡起了臂膀。森林走到這一步,已經不認任何憑證,它只認擋在門外的,和它自己。

combat.intro: 斷藤與獸骨絞成的兩尊守衛自拱門陰影中立起,濕木擰絞般的呻吟裡沉沉逼近。
combat.introEn: Two wardens twisted from broken vine and beast-bone rise out of the arch's shadow, closing in heavily amid groans like wrung wet wood.

choices.text: 穿過枯萎的拱門,直入巨樹外圈
choices.textEn: Pass through the withered arch, into the great tree's outer ring

choices.text: 先探拱門旁那條野花小徑
choices.textEn: First follow the small wildflower path beside the arch

nodes.narrationEn: The arch of thorns stands three men high, faded strips of cloth snagged on its spikes — by their age, left across ten years by whoever strayed into this wood. In the shadow beneath, two heaps of "deadwood" rise slowly to their feet: wardens twisted out of broken vine and beast-bone, shoulder-blades of stag skulls, knuckles of snapped thorn, their joints turning with the groan of wet wood being wrung. Show your charm, your mask, what you will — the two hollow skulls do hesitate, one heartbeat's worth. Then the arms come up all the same, slow and heavy. This deep in, the forest honours no token. It knows only what stands outside its door — and itself.

nodes.title: 無名的墳
nodes.directive: 拱門旁小徑盡頭是一座無碑的墳,野花開得反常茂盛——艾溫的葬身處,是當年不忍的某個村民偷偷收的骨。墳前小龕裡有半闋童謠的終句刻片與少量供銀。取得終句者可在終戰把童謠唱完整,效果關鍵。
nodes.narration: 小徑的盡頭安靜得連鐘聲都退了出去。一座矮矮的土墳臥在野花中央,沒有碑,沒有名,墳頭的花卻開得反常:別處的花要么翡翠要么枯敗,唯獨這裡開著尋常的、活生生的雛菊和野薔薇,像有人年年來除草。墳前擺著一只巴掌大的木龕,龕裡一塊刻字的木片和幾枚供銀,木片上的刀工笨拙,刻的是那支童謠的最後一句——你們拼出的歌詞裡沒有的一句:「名字若有人肯唱,土裡的孩子就回家。」木片背面刻著極小的一個「瑪」字。

items.name: 童謠終句刻片
items.properties: 刻著童謠失傳的最後一句:「名字若有人肯唱,土裡的孩子就回家」;有了它,那支童謠才算完整

treasure.intro: 無名墳前的木龕裡,一塊刻片安靜躺著,笨拙的刀工一筆一筆都刻得很深。
treasure.introEn: In the wooden shrine before the nameless grave a carved tablet lies quiet, every stroke of its clumsy knife-work cut deep.

choices.text: 在墳前默立片刻,再前往巨樹
choices.textEn: Stand a moment in silence at the grave, then go on toward the great tree

choices.text: 帶上刻片,直接趕往巨樹外圈
choices.textEn: Take the tablet and make straight for the tree's outer ring

nodes.narrationEn: At the path's end even the bell has withdrawn into silence. A low earthen mound lies amid the wildflowers, no stone, no name — but the flowers on it grow all wrong: everywhere else blooms emerald or withers, and only here open ordinary, living daisies and briar-roses, as if someone came every year to pull the weeds. Before the mound sits a palm-sized wooden shrine holding a carved tablet and a few coins of offering-silver. The knife-work on the tablet is clumsy, and what it carves is the rhyme's last line — the line missing from the verses you pieced together: "If ever a soul will sing the name, the child in the earth comes home." On the tablet's back, cut very small, is the beginning of a name: "Mar—".

nodes.title: 記憶之潭
nodes.directive: 林間綠潭倒映的不是天空,而是十年前的完整片段:火刑當夜,小瑟芙抱著空空的手在林緣哭到睡著,巨樹的根鬚將她輕輕捲起收進樹心;此後十年,樹以她的夢養花,她以花聽村。讓玩家理解瑟芙與樹融合的來龍去脈,以及她要的從來不是報復,是「有人肯記得」。
nodes.narration: 綠潭平得像一面鏡子,倒映的卻不是樹冠,而是火光。你們俯身看下去:火刑當夜,小瑟芙抱著那雙空空的手,在林緣哭到抽噎、哭到睡著;巨樹的根鬚從土裡緩緩擡起,像一雙不知該怎麼安慰人的手,笨拙地把孩子捲起,收進樹心。畫面往後翻,十年在潭水裡流成一線:樹用她的夢養出滿樹的花,她用滿村的花聽人說話,聽了十年,沒有一個人再說起她的名字。潭水最後定格在今晨:她終於等不下去,把整個村子輕輕拉進了夢裡。

choices.text: 潛到潭底,把最後一幕看完
choices.checkHint: 意志:承受十年孤獨的重量
choices.textEn: Dive to the pool's floor and watch the last scene to its end

choices.text: 不忍再看,找地方稍作喘息再上路
choices.textEn: You cannot bear to watch more — find a place to breathe before going on

nodes.narrationEn: The green pool lies flat as a mirror, and what it reflects is not the canopy but firelight. You lean over and look down: the night of the burning, little Seffa hugging her two empty hands at the treeline, crying herself into hiccups, crying herself asleep; the great tree's root-tendrils lifting slowly out of the soil, like a pair of hands that has never learned how to comfort anyone, gathering the child up, clumsy and careful, into its heart. The image turns, and ten years run through the pool-water in a single thread: the tree growing its flowers on her dreams, she listening to the village through its flowers — listening for ten years, and never once hearing anyone speak her name. The water settles last on this morning: she has finally stopped waiting, and drawn the whole village, gently, into the dream.

nodes.title: 樹洞喘息
nodes.directive: 節奏喘息點:一截中空的倒木可供隊伍最後休整,包紮、恢復法力、清點道具(種子、護符、判決書、銀鈴、刻片)。樹洞裡夢與醒的邊界極薄,閉眼能聽見慶典的鼓點,睜眼是森林的鐘聲。給玩家一刻安靜,整理他們要做的決定。
nodes.narration: 一截中空的倒木橫在苔地上,洞裡乾燥,鋪著經年的落葉,像個現成的窩。你們鑽進去,升了一小堆無煙的火,把傷口重新裹過,將一路攢下的東西攤在膝頭清點:溫熱的種子、燒不毀的護符、墨跡淋漓的判決書、小小的銀鈴、刻著終句的木片。每一樣都很輕,壘在一起卻沉得壓手。樹洞裡的夢醒邊界薄得像紙——閉上眼,耳邊是慶典的鼓點和面具下整齊的笑;睜開眼,是森林深處一聲一聲的鐘。誰都沒說話。有些決定,得趁安靜的時候想好。

choices.text: 整備完畢,前往巨樹外圈
choices.textEn: Rested and ready, head for the great tree's outer ring

choices.text: 折回無名墳,把沒看完的線索補齊
choices.textEn: Go back to the nameless grave and gather what you left unfinished

nodes.narrationEn: A length of hollow deadfall lies across the moss, dry inside, floored with years of fallen leaves — a ready-made den. You crawl in, raise a small smokeless fire, dress your wounds again, and spread everything the road has given you across your knees: the warm seed, the charm fire would not take, the verdict with its ink still glistening, the little silver bell, the tablet carved with the last line. Each is light. Stacked together they press on the hand. In the hollow, the border of dream and waking is thin as paper — eyes closed, you hear festival drums and the even smiling under masks; eyes open, the bell tolling one stroke at a time from the forest's deep. No one speaks. Some decisions are best settled while there is quiet to settle them in.

nodes.title: 環樹的夢遊者
nodes.directive: 巨樹外圈:數十名夢遊的村民閉著眼環樹而行,組成活的壁障,一經觸碰即被無數隻手纏住。強調傷害他們等於傷害沉睡中的真身。三種通過方式:硬闖(傷及無辜)、唱童謠引開(回收伏筆)、面具混行。傾向值在此明顯擺動。
nodes.narration: 巨樹近在眼前,樹身粗得像一座塔,發光的藤沿著樹皮織成脈絡,整棵樹一明一滅,是這座森林的心跳。樹根外圈,數十名村民閉著眼、拖著腳,一圈一圈緩緩繞行——夢遊的真身不在這裡,可你們認得那些臉:灶邊的母親、井邊的婦人、發面具的執事。他們像一道活的籬笆,把樹護在最裡面。有人試探著往圈裡邁了半步,離得最近的三四個村民立刻循聲偏頭,幾十隻手同時朝這邊虛虛擡起。傷了他們,村裡那些沉睡的身體,會一併醒不過來。

choices.text: 揮開村民硬闖進圈,顧不得許多
choices.textEn: Shove through the villagers and force the ring, whatever it costs

choices.text: 唱起那支童謠,引夢遊者讓出一條路
choices.checkHint: 表演:把童謠唱得像十年前那樣
choices.textEn: Sing the rhyme, and draw the sleepwalkers into opening a path

choices.text: 戴上慶典面具,跟著繞行的隊伍混進內圈
choices.checkHint: 隱匿:模仿夢遊者的步伐
choices.textEn: Put on the festival masks and join the circling walk into the inner ring

nodes.narrationEn: The great tree stands before you, its trunk broad as a tower, glowing vines woven through its bark like veins; the whole tree brightens and dims — the heartbeat of this forest. Around the roots' outer ring, dozens of villagers shuffle slowly with their eyes closed, circle after circle. Their true bodies are not here — and yet you know these faces: the mother from the stove-side, the woman from the well, the steward who handed out masks. They walk as a living fence, holding the tree at its centre. Someone tests half a step into the ring, and the three or four nearest villagers tilt their heads toward the sound at once, dozens of hands lifting softly, together, in your direction. Harm them here, and the sleeping bodies back in the village will never wake at all.

nodes.title: 讓開的人牆
nodes.directive: 不傷一人穿過人牆:童謠或面具起效,夢遊的村民放緩腳步讓出通路,閉著的眼角卻滲出淚來——他們在夢的最深處聽見了那支歌。通過時安排一兩張熟面孔(灶邊的母親、瑪珂沒有出現在此)輕聲跟唱。內圈中央,村長的影子已在等候。
nodes.narration: 歌聲落進人牆的第一句,繞行的腳步就亂了半拍。第二句唱完,離你們最近的婦人停了下來,閉著眼,喉嚨輕輕滾動,跟著哼出了第三句。灶邊那位母親的聲音沙啞走調,淚水卻從閉著的眼角一線一線滑下來。人牆緩緩地、無聲地分開一道縫,像麥田讓開一陣風。你們從讓開的人縫裡走過,兩側全是掛著淚的沉睡的臉。內圈的樹根盤成一片空場,空場中央立著一小攤濃得化不開的黑——村長的影子先一步到了,正從地面緩緩立起人形。

choices.text: 迎上那道立起的影子
choices.textEn: Go to meet the risen shadow

choices.text: 退回樹洞稍整,再入內圈
choices.textEn: Withdraw to the hollow to regroup, then enter the inner ring

nodes.narrationEn: The first line of the song drops into the wall of walkers, and the shuffling stumbles half a beat. By the second line the nearest woman has stopped, eyes still closed, her throat working softly — and she hums the third line with you. The stove-side mother's voice is cracked and off-key, and tears slide line after line from under her closed lids — in the deepest part of the dream, they have heard the song. Slowly, soundlessly, the wall of people parts, a wheat-field letting a wind through. You walk the opened seam between sleeping faces wet with weeping. In the inner ring the roots coil into a bare clearing, and at its centre stands a small pool of black too thick to dissolve — the elder's shadow has arrived before you, and is rising slowly off the ground into the shape of a man.

nodes.title: 夢中村長影
nodes.directive: 中Boss戰:十年來吞著記憶種子長大的村長之影,體內翡翠光在黑霧中沉浮,招式是拉扯玩家自己的影子、以罪語低喃惑心。它是「藏起來的罪」的具象。戰至半血描述種子在其胸腔發光掙動。擊敗後影子攤回地面,種子裸露可取。
nodes.narration: 那攤黑立成了歐德的形狀,比真人高出一頭,輪廓不斷被黑霧推著變形。它的胸腔裡懸著一點翡翠光——十年前被一雙小手按進來的種子,在濃黑裡一明一滅,像吞不下去也吐不出來的一句話。影子開口了,用歐德的聲音,也用整個村子的聲音:「忘了,就不痛了。忘了,就都好了。」它擡手一扯,你們腳下的影子竟被拽得離地三寸,骨頭縫裡湧上一陣陌生的睏意。這是全村的罪藏了十年的地方,而它今天終於站起來,不許任何人把它翻出來。

combat.intro: 村長的影子立成高出真人一頭的黑,胸腔裡那點翡翠光一明一滅,無數隻影手自它腳下的黑潭裡撐地而起。
combat.introEn: The elder's shadow rears up a head taller than the living man, the point of emerald light in its chest pulsing, as countless shadow-hands push up from the black pool at its feet.

choices.text: 剖開攤回地面的影子,取出那枚種子
choices.textEn: Cut open the collapsed shadow, and take out the seed

choices.text: 不碰影核,直接走向巨樹
choices.textEn: Leave the shadow's core untouched and walk on to the great tree

nodes.narrationEn: The pool of black rises into Odell's shape, a head taller than the living man, its outline endlessly pushed and remade by the dark haze. In its chest hangs a point of emerald light — the seed a pair of small hands pressed in ten years ago, waxing and waning inside the blackness like a sentence that can be neither swallowed nor spoken. The shadow opens its mouth, in Odell's voice and in the whole village's voice at once: "Forget, and it stops hurting. Forget, and all is well." It raises a hand and pulls — and your own shadows are wrenched three inches off the ground, a strange drowsiness welling up through the seams of your bones. This is where the village's sin has hidden for ten years. And today it has finally stood up, to let no one drag it into the light.

nodes.title: 影中的種子
nodes.directive: 伏筆回收:從影子裡取出的正是小瑟芙當年藏進去的那枚記憶種子——十年間吸飽了全村「拼命想忘掉的東西」,沉甸甸的,貼近耳邊能聽見無數人的懺悔低語。它是「罪的原本」,終戰勸說與結局分配的核心道具。
nodes.narration: 影子攤回地面,黑霧散盡,那點翡翠光靜靜躺在泥土上。你們捧起它——正是巷子裡那枚,小瑟芙情急之下按進影子的種子,只是重了,沉甸甸壓著掌心,像一顆灌了鉛的心臟。貼近耳邊,種殼裡傳出細細的低語,一層疊著一層:歐德唸判決的聲音在說「我本可以不判」,發面具的執事在說「我本可以不發」,人群裡的某個嗓音在說「我看見了,我什麼都沒說」。十年裡全村拼命想忘掉的東西,原來一個字都沒丟,全在這裡。

items.name: 記憶種子·罪核
items.properties: 封存著全村十年的悔與罪的原本;吞下者代村背負全部記憶,交還瑟芙則由她定奪;是結局分配的核心

treasure.intro: 黑霧散處,那枚被影子藏了十年的種子靜靜發著光,沉得不像一枚種子。
treasure.introEn: Where the black haze thins, the seed the shadow hid for ten years glows quietly — far too heavy, now, for a seed.

choices.text: 捧著種子,走向巨樹森心
choices.textEn: Carry the seed onward, toward the Forest Heart

choices.text: 讓種子貼近護符——樹身傳來一聲嗚咽
choices.textEn: Hold the seed to the wooden charm — and a sob passes through the tree

nodes.narrationEn: The shadow spreads flat on the ground again; the black haze thins and dies, and the point of emerald light lies quietly on the soil. You gather it up — the very seed from the lane, the one little Seffa pressed into a shadow in her panic, only heavy now, heavy in the palm like a heart poured full of lead. Held close to the ear, thin whispers come through the shell, layer pressed upon layer: Odell's voice reading the verdict, saying I could have chosen not to judge; the steward with the masks, saying I could have chosen not to hand them out; some voice in the crowd, saying I saw, and I said nothing. Everything the village spent ten years straining to forget — not one word of it was lost. It is all here.

nodes.title: 森心之下
nodes.directive: 終幕前廳:巨樹樹身裂開一道發光的樹洞,洞內可見成年瑟芙與樹融合的剪影——綠髮散作藤蔓,心口與樹心同搏。天光透過樹冠,外界的日輪只剩半指高。這裡是最後喘息,渲染悲憫與壓迫並存的氣氛,不急著開戰。
nodes.narration: 巨樹在你們面前緩緩裂開一道縫,像敞開自己的胸口。樹洞裡光如水漫,一個女子的剪影懸在光的中央——成年的瑟芙,綠髮散開,髮梢化作千百股細藤沒入樹身,分不清哪裡是她的脊背、哪裡是樹的年輪;她心口那點光和整棵樹的明滅同一個節奏,一下,一下,是你們循著走了一整座森林的那個心跳。樹冠的縫隙裡漏下最後的天光,外頭的日輪只剩半指高了。她閉著眼,眉心微蹙,像睡著,又像疼了十年,忘了怎麼醒。

choices.text: 輕聲喚她的名字:「瑟芙。」
choices.textEn: Call her name, gently: "Seffa."

choices.text: 握緊武器逼近,不給她先手的機會
choices.textEn: Close in with weapons ready, and give her no first move

nodes.narrationEn: The great tree parts slowly before you, a seam of light opening like a chest laid bare. Inside the hollow, light floods like water, and a woman's silhouette hangs at its centre — Seffa, grown: green hair unbound, its ends fraying into a thousand fine vines that run away into the trunk, until you cannot tell where her spine ends and the tree's rings begin. The light at her breast keeps the same rhythm as the whole tree's brightening and dimming — one beat, one beat: the heartbeat you have followed through the length of this forest. Through gaps in the canopy the last daylight leaks down; outside, the sun's disc stands half a finger from the ridge. Her eyes are closed, a faint knot in her brow — asleep, or ten years in pain, having forgotten the way to wake.

nodes.title: 瑟芙的心聲
nodes.directive: 伏筆回收:瑟芙睜眼,借玩家隊伍中最年輕成員的聲音開口——與廣場那朵求救花同聲,因為她十年只學會了「借聲」。她道出兩難:喚醒村民,罪與名一起攤在日光下,村子從此再無安寧;繼續沉睡,村民得享無夢的安眠,而她與真相一起爛在樹裡。她不要報復,只想有人肯唱她的名字。
nodes.narration: 她睜開眼,眼瞳是花脈一樣的翡翠色。開口時,你們的心同時一縮:又是那個聲音,隊裡最年輕那位的聲音,和廣場上那朵花分毫不差。「對不起,借你的喉嚨。」她說,「十年沒人跟我講話,我只學會了借。」千百股藤蔓隨著她的呼吸輕輕起伏:「我把村子拉進夢裡,不是要燒回去。我只是想——日落之前,能不能有一個人,肯把我的名字連著那首歌唱完。」她垂下眼睛:「可他們一醒,罪也就醒了。安寧和真相,你們替我選吧。我選了十年,選不動了。」

choices.text: 「我們替你把真相帶回日光底下。」
choices.textEn: "We will carry the truth back into daylight for you."

choices.text: 「睡吧,瑟芙。遺忘也是一種安寧。」
choices.textEn: "Sleep, Seffa. Forgetting is a kind of peace too."

choices.text: 沉默不語,先把手中每樣信物擺在她面前
choices.textEn: Say nothing — lay every token you carry before her, one by one

nodes.narrationEn: She opens her eyes; the pupils are the emerald of flower-veins. And when she speaks, every heart among you clenches at once: it is that voice again — the youngest of your company, note for note the flower on the square. "I'm sorry. I'm borrowing your throat," she says. "No one has spoken to me in ten years. Borrowing is all I ever learned." The thousand vines rise and fall gently with her breathing. "I didn't pull the village into the dream to burn it back. I only wanted — before the sun goes down — for one person to be willing to sing my name to the end of that song." She lowers her eyes. "But the moment they wake, the sin wakes too. Peace, or the truth — choose for me. I have been choosing for ten years, and I cannot any more."

nodes.title: 誰來承擔
nodes.directive: 第四幕瓶頸,全劇道德軸心:日輪貼底,選擇不能再拖。三條路:喚醒全村共擔真相(需面對揭罪的代價)、隊伍吞下罪核代村背負(犧牲自我)、或斬斷森心以火了結(暴力終局)。前兩者進入勸說終節,後者直接開戰。把每個選項的代價說明白,不勸誘、不評判。
nodes.narration: 樹冠外,日輪的下緣碰到了山脊。藤蔓的光開始變急,滿森林的心跳一聲趕著一聲——夢正在往現實裡扎根,你們能感覺到腳下的土地已經開始「記住」這場夢的形狀。瑟芙懸在光裡看著你們,不催,也不辯。你們掌心裡是沉甸甸的罪核,懷裡是判決書、護符、銀鈴和刻著終句的木片。喚醒全村,真相連著罪一起攤在日光下,苔鐘村再也回不到從前;把種子吞下,罪就長在你們自己的骨頭裡;或者一把火,讓森心和往事一起燒乾淨。日輪又沉了一線。

choices.text: 喚醒全村——罪與名,都該在日光下說清
choices.textEn: Wake the whole village — sin and name alike belong in daylight

choices.text: 隊伍吞下罪核,替這村子背著走
choices.textEn: Swallow the sin-core yourselves, and carry it for this village

choices.text: 斬斷森心,把這一切連根燒盡
choices.textEn: Cut down the Forest Heart, and burn all of it out by the roots

nodes.narrationEn: Beyond the canopy, the sun's lower rim touches the ridge. The light in the vines quickens; the forest's heartbeat crowds stroke against stroke — the dream is putting down roots into the real, and underfoot you can feel the ground already learning the dream's shape. Seffa hangs in the light and watches you, not urging, not pleading her case. In your palm lies the sin-core with all its weight; against your chest, the verdict, the charm, the silver bell, and the tablet with the last line. Wake the village, and the truth comes into daylight with the sin joined to it — Mossbell will never again be what it was. Swallow the seed, and the sin grows in your own bones instead. Or set the fire, and let the Forest Heart and everything past burn clean together. The sun sinks another line.

nodes.title: 森心前的勸說
nodes.directive: 終局勸說:玩家把信物一一呈上——銀鈴搖出母親的聲音、護符與琥珀裡的目光、判決書上完整的名字、以及唱完整支童謠。若隊伍一路行善積義(傾向足夠),瑟芙信任他們,依選擇走向村民共擔或隊伍代負的結局;若傾向不足,她讀出這一路的粗暴與功利,勸說在她崩潰的悲鳴中碎裂,善選滑向火焚的結局——敘事上寫作「她不敢再信人了」。
nodes.narration: 你們把東西一樣一樣擺在光裡。搖動銀鈴,鈴聲裡浮出艾溫哄睡的嗓音,瑟芙的藤蔓劇烈地顫了一下;琥珀舉起來,那道臨終的目光穿過十年,落在她臉上;判決書攤開,被墨塗死的名字此刻一字不缺。最後,你們開口唱那支童謠,從第一句唱到墳前刻片上的最後一句:「名字若有人肯唱,土裡的孩子就回家。」歌聲落定,滿樹翡翠花同時靜止。瑟芙懸在光中央,翡翠色的眼瞳一眨不眨地望著你們,像在稱量這十年裡她還敢不敢、最後信一次人。

choices.text: 「醒來吧。這一次,全村陪你記得。」
choices.textEn: "Wake now. This time, the whole village remembers with you."

choices.text: 當著她的面吞下罪核:「我們替他們記。」
choices.textEn: Swallow the sin-core before her eyes: "We will remember for them."

choices.text: 勸不動就搶——奪過種子,點火燒樹
choices.textEn: If she will not be persuaded, take — seize the seed and set fire to the tree

nodes.narrationEn: You set the tokens out in the light, one by one. The silver bell rings, and out of the ringing rises Aewen's lull-to-sleep voice; Seffa's vines shudder, hard. The amber lifts, and that dying gaze crosses ten years to rest on her face. The verdict opens, and the names the ink once drowned are here entire, not a stroke missing. Last of all, you sing — the rhyme from its first line down to the line on the grave-tablet: "If ever a soul will sing the name, the child in the earth comes home." The song settles. Every emerald flower on the tree goes still at once. Seffa hangs at the centre of the light, emerald eyes on you, unblinking — weighing whether, after these ten years, she dares trust a person one last time.

nodes.title: 遺忘之霧
nodes.directive: 遺忘路線:瑟芙沉默良久,同意「用忘換安」——她將收回所有藤蔓與記憶,連同自己一起沉入樹心最深處,村民醒來將不記得這一天,也永遠不記得她。執行到一半玩家仍可反悔喚醒她;若執意完成則入中立結局;若在儀式中貪求森心之力或拖延至日落,夢境覆寫,墜入 bad 結局。
nodes.narration: 瑟芙聽完,沉默了很久很久,久到樹身的心跳都慢了下來。「好。」她終於說,還是用借來的聲音,「忘,我熟。」千百股藤蔓開始從村子的方向緩緩退回,像退潮;她的身影一寸一寸往樹心深處沉,綠霧自樹洞裡漫出來,涼的,帶著花香,拂過誰,誰的眉頭就鬆開一分。「他們醒來,會以為只是睡了個好覺。」她的聲音越來越輕,「井裡的歌,也帶走。名字……名字就算了。」霧漫到你們腳邊停住了,像最後問一句:真的,就這樣了嗎?日輪還剩最後一線。

choices.text: 點頭,送她和所有記憶一起沉入樹心
choices.textEn: Nod — and let her sink into the tree's heart with every memory

choices.text: 霧漫過腳背的瞬間反悔——喊出她的名字
choices.textEn: Repent the instant the mist crosses your feet — call out her name

choices.text: 趁霧起時伸手探向森心,想連力量一併取走
choices.textEn: Reach through the rising mist toward the Forest Heart, to take its power with you

nodes.narrationEn: Seffa listens, and is silent a long, long time — long enough for the tree's heartbeat to slow. "All right," she says at last, still in the borrowed voice. "Forgetting — that, I know how to do." The thousand vines begin drawing back from the village, slow as a tide going out; her figure sinks inch by inch toward the deep of the tree's heart, and green mist spills from the hollow, cool, flower-scented — whoever it brushes, their brow loosens a little. "They'll wake thinking they only slept well." Her voice grows lighter and lighter. "The song in the well — I'll take that too. The name… let the name go." The mist reaches your feet and stops there, like one last question: truly — is this how it ends? The sun has a single line of light left.

nodes.title: 森心瑟芙
nodes.directive: 終Boss戰:兵刃或火光落向森心的瞬間,瑟芙的悲鳴震動整座森林,藤蔓化作千手護心,花瓣如刃。她可勸可戰:戰至力竭時她會露出破綻般的停頓,那是最後一次伸手的機會——唱童謠遞護符可止戈(入中立結局);堅持斬斷森心或棄戰而逃則墜入兩個 bad 結局。她的每一次攻擊都夾著哭腔。
nodes.narration: 兵刃擡起的瞬間,整座森林發出一聲悲鳴——不是風聲,是瑟芙的嗓子,幾百朵花同時在哭。她心口的光暴漲,千百股藤蔓自樹身炸開,絞成護在森心之前的千手,翡翠花瓣繃直如刃,綠霧翻湧著壓低了天光。「又是火……又要燒……」她的聲音碎在藤蔓的抽擊裡,每一鞭都重得能斷骨,每一鞭又都帶著哭腔,像一個孩子一邊揮拳一邊嚎啕。滿場夢遊的村民在外圈齊齊跪倒,閉著眼淌淚。樹冠外,日輪只剩一線。這一戰打到最後,總得有人先鬆手。

combat.intro: 森心的光暴漲,千股藤蔓絞成護心的千手,花瓣繃直如刃——瑟芙的每一擊都夾著哭腔。
combat.introEn: The Forest Heart's light blazes; a thousand vines twist into a thousand guarding hands, petals drawn knife-straight — and every blow Seffa strikes carries a sob.

choices.text: 在她力竭停頓的一瞬唱起童謠,遞出護符
choices.checkHint: 表演:在刀光裡把歌唱穩
choices.textEn: In the pause of her spent strength, sing the rhyme and hold out the charm

choices.text: 不容遲疑,一鼓作氣斬斷森心
choices.textEn: Allow no hesitation — cut the Forest Heart down in one stroke

choices.text: 棄戰撤出森林,任夢境漫過村莊
choices.textEn: Abandon the fight and flee the forest, and let the dream take the village

nodes.narrationEn: The instant a blade lifts, the whole forest cries out — not wind, but Seffa's voice, hundreds of flowers weeping at once. The light at her breast blazes; a thousand vines burst from the trunk and twist into a thousand hands guarding the Forest Heart; emerald petals pull knife-straight; green mist rolls and presses down what light remains. "Fire again… burning, again…" Her voice breaks apart inside the whipping of the vines. Every lash lands heavy enough to crack bone, and every lash carries a sob in it, like a child howling as she swings her fists. In the outer ring the sleepwalking villagers sink to their knees as one, weeping behind closed eyes. Beyond the canopy the sun is down to a single line. However this battle ends, someone will have to let go first.

nodes.title: 全村共記
nodes.directive: 最佳結局(村民承擔):瑟芙信了最後一次。玩家搖鈴、出示判決、唱完整首童謠,她收回夢境喚醒全村;村民在廣場上聽完全部真相,歐德與瑪珂當眾認罪。代價由全村分擔——羞恥、離散、漫長的和解。收尾要有鐘聲、刻回的名字與每年一開的翡翠花,克制而有餘溫。
nodes.narration: 瑟芙閉上眼,滿樹的花同時轉向村莊的方向。藤蔓退潮般縮回森林,苔鐘村在暮色裡一戶接一戶地醒來——而她借著每一朵花,把十年前那一夜原原本本地放給全村看完。沒有人能移開眼睛。人群自己讓出一條路,歐德走到廣場中央,把判決書的每一個字唸了一遍,包括自己的名字;瑪珂跪在無名墳的方向,把「告發人」三個字說得清清楚楚。那晚沒有人吃得下飯,也沒有人再睡得著,有人連夜收拾行李離開了村子,也有人提著燈,把鐘舌重新裝回了鐘樓。你們離村那天,苔鐘響了三聲,十年來頭一回。石碑上被鑿去的地方,新刻的「瑟芙」二字還泛著石粉的白。村史往後添了難看的一頁,可孩子們在樹下唱的童謠,終於唱到了最後一句。廣場的古樹每年開一次翡翠花,只開一夜。開花那夜,全村都到樹下守著,誰也不許忘。
nodes.narrationEn: Seffa closes her eyes, and every flower on the tree turns toward the village at once. The vines draw back into the forest like a tide going out, and in the dusk Mossbell wakes house by house — while through every flower she plays that night of ten years ago back to the whole village, from its first moment to its last. No one can look away. The crowd parts of its own accord. Odell walks to the centre of the square and reads the verdict aloud, every word of it, his own name included; Marko kneels toward the nameless grave and speaks the word accuser clearly, so all can hear. No one eats that night, and no one sleeps either; some pack their bags in the dark and leave the village for good, and some carry lanterns to the tower and set the clapper back into the Moss Bell. The day you leave, the bell rings three times — the first time in ten years. Where the chisel gouged the tablet, the fresh-cut name Seffa still shows white with stone-dust. The village record has gained an ugly page; but the rhyme the children sing beneath the tree now reaches its last line. And once a year the old tree blooms emerald, for a single night — and on that night the whole village keeps watch beneath the branches, and no one is permitted to forget.

nodes.title: 代村者
nodes.directive: 有代價的善結局(隊伍承擔):玩家吞下罪核,全村的十年悔罪長進隊伍的記憶裡。村民安然醒來,只當睡了一個長覺;瑟芙得以安眠於樹心,託付而非消散。代價具體:隊員夜夜輪流夢見火刑、身上花香不散、每年鐘鳴之日須回村講述。寫出「背著走」的重量與一點驕傲。
nodes.narration: 罪核入喉,是燙的。十年的低語順著喉嚨往下沉,在你們每個人的骨頭裡找地方住下:歐德的「我本可以不判」、瑪珂的簽名、幾百張面具後整齊的沉默。從今往後,這些都是你們的記憶了,和自己的初吻、舊仇、亡母的臉擺在同一層。瑟芙看著你們把它吞完,像看著什麼不可思議的東西。「會很重。」她說。「我們人多。」你們答。她笑了,十年來第一次,然後散作滿樹流螢似的光,沉入樹心安眠——不是消散,是託付。村民在暮色裡醒來,伸著懶腰互相打趣睡過了頭,灶上的湯重新熱過,誰也不記得這一天。只有你們記得。此後的年月裡,你們夜夜輪流夢見那場火,身上的花香洗不掉,每年苔鐘自己輕響的那一日,無論人在天涯何處,都得回村一趟,在古樹底下把整個故事講一遍,講給樹聽,講給睡得安穩的村子聽。擔子沉。可你們人多,擔得動。
nodes.narrationEn: The sin-core goes down burning. Ten years of whispers sink through your throats and find lodging in each of your bones: Odell's I could have chosen not to judge, Marko's signature, the even silence behind hundreds of masks. From now on these are your memories, shelved beside your own first kisses, old grudges, dead mothers' faces. Seffa watches you swallow it down as if watching something impossible. "It will be heavy," she says. "There are several of us," you answer. She smiles — the first time in ten years — then scatters into light like a treeful of fireflies and sinks into the tree's heart to sleep: not a vanishing, but a trust. The villagers wake in the dusk, stretching, teasing each other for oversleeping; the soup is reheated on the stove; no one remembers the day. Only you remember. In the years after, you dream the fire in turns, night after night; the flower-scent never quite washes from your skin; and on the one day each year when the Moss Bell hums softly of itself, wherever in the world you are, you return to the village and tell the whole story beneath the old tree — telling it to the tree, and to the village sleeping soundly around it. The burden is heavy. But there are several of you, and it can be carried.

nodes.title: 獨眠的守林人
