nodes.directive: 中立結局(瑟芙承擔):無論經由遺忘儀式或戰後止戈,瑟芙收回全部記憶與怨憤,獨自帶著真相沉入樹心。村民醒來一無所知,安寧完好,但廣場古樹不再開花,鐘每年那一日發悶。玩家全身而退卻各懷心事。寫出「太平無事」底下那一點空,不控訴、不昇華。
nodes.narration: 瑟芙沒有再說什麼。她朝你們極輕地點了一下頭,然後連同滿樹的光、滿村的藤、井底的歌和所有沒人肯唱的名字,一起沉進樹心最深處。綠霧漫過村莊又退去,像一場誰也沒看見的潮。村民在飯桌邊醒來,揉著眼睛把涼了的湯重新熱過,笑話彼此睡迷糊了;孩子找不到懷裡那張畫,哭了一場,第二天也就忘了。巴魯的商隊照舊每月進村收山貨,瑪珂照舊賣她的苦茶,只是再沒人見她睡過一個整覺。你們領了謝禮離開,誰也沒提森林裡的事——說了也不會有人信,更不會有人記得該信什麼。只是往後每逢途經林緣,你們總會不約而同地放慢腳步。廣場的古樹自那天起再沒開過花,枝葉依舊繁茂,只是綠得沉默。鐘樓的鐘修好了,平日敲得清亮,唯獨每年同一個日子,那一聲會發悶,像隔著什麼東西。全村只有你們知道隔著的是什麼。而你們,也只是路過的人。
nodes.narrationEn: Seffa says nothing more. She gives you the smallest nod, and then — with all the tree's light, all the village's vines, the song in the well and every name no one would sing — she sinks into the deepest heart of the tree. Green mist washes over the village and withdraws, a tide no one sees. The villagers wake at their tables, rub their eyes, reheat the cooled soup, laugh at each other for dozing off; the child cannot find the drawing he was holding, cries over it, and by the next day has forgotten. Balu's caravan comes through monthly for mountain goods, as it always has; Marko sells her bitter tea, as she always has — only no one ever again sees her sleep a whole night. You take your reward and go, and speak of the forest to no one — no one would believe it, and no one is left who could remember what to believe. Only, ever after, passing the treeline, you find yourselves slowing, all at the same step, without a word. The old tree has not flowered since that day; its leaves are as full as ever, only green in a way that keeps silent. The tower bell is mended and rings clear the year round — except on one same day each year, when the stroke comes out muffled, as if through some thickness. In all the village, only you know what the thickness is. And you are only passers-by.

nodes.title: 翡翠覆村
nodes.directive: 壞結局其一(森林承擔/覆寫):因拖延、棄戰或貪取森心之力,日落降臨,夢境落地生根。苔鐘村徹底併入森林,村民化為永眠的綠影,慶典在藤蔓間永恆重演。玩家僥倖逃出(或半身沾綠),留下悔恨的餘韻與多年後的傳聞。成因是「錯過與貪念」,寫出緩慢溫柔的恐怖。
nodes.narration: 日輪沉底的那一瞬,森林深處傳來一聲極輕的嘆息,像誰終於等累了。夢不再挽留誰,也不再放過誰——它落了地。你們是踩著瘋長的藤蔓逃出林口的,身後的苔鐘村在暮色裡以肉眼可見的速度返青:屋脊抽芽,牆垣開花,街道成溪,炊煙化霧。全村的沉睡者站了起來,卻沒有醒,他們提著並不存在的燈籠,在藤蔓間緩緩走成一圈,面具長在了臉上,童謠在花叢裡一遍一遍地唱,永遠唱不到最後一句。有人回頭看了一眼,從此左半邊的頭髮再沒褪去那層綠。商道自那年起繞開了這片林子。多年後仍有旅人賭咒發誓,說月圓之夜路過林緣,能看見林子深處燈火通明,鼓點與笑語隱約,像一場永不散席的慶典;林口開滿翡翠色的花,每一朵湊近了聽,都用不同的聲音說著同一句話:「留下來,一起睡。」你們知道那些聲音是誰的。每一個,你們都叫得出名字。
nodes.narrationEn: The instant the sun's disc goes under, a very small sigh drifts out of the forest's depths, as of someone finally grown too tired to wait. The dream stops holding anyone back — and stops letting anyone go. It takes root. You escape the treeline over vines growing faster than a man can run, and behind you Mossbell greens in the dusk before your eyes: roof-ridges budding, walls flowering, streets running into brooks, chimney-smoke turning to mist. The sleepers rise to their feet without waking; carrying lanterns that do not exist, they walk their slow circle among the vines; the masks have grown onto their faces; and among the flowers the rhyme sings itself over and over, never once reaching its last line. One of you looks back — once — and the left side of their hair never loses its green again. The trade road has bent around this forest since that year. Yet travellers long after still swear that, passing the treeline on full-moon nights, they have seen lights deep in the wood, drums and laughter faint inside — a festival that never ends; and that the emerald flowers at the forest's mouth, leaned close to, speak in different voices, every one saying the same thing: "Stay. Sleep with us." You know whose voices they are. Every one of them, you can call by name.

nodes.title: 第二次火刑
nodes.directive: 壞結局其二(以火了結):玩家斬斷森心或奪核焚樹,瑟芙第二次死於火,臨終只輕輕說了一句「和上次一樣」。村民醒來毫無記憶,森林連同水井一起枯死,村莊得救卻失了根。結尾必須落在輪迴的暗示:灰土裡抽出新芽。成因是「暴力與掩蓋」,與翡翠覆村的成因區隔。
nodes.narration: 森心斷裂的聲音不像木頭,倒像一根繃了十年的弦。火順著藤蔓的脈絡吞下整棵巨樹,滿樹翡翠花在烈焰裡一朵一朵爆成碎光,像一場倒放的雪。瑟芙沒有掙扎。火合攏之前,她懸在光裡看著你們,用那個借來的、你們熟悉的聲音輕輕說:「和上次一樣。」然後火就把剩下的話燒完了。村民在暮色裡醒來,對這一天毫無記憶,他們歡天喜地款待你們這些「除了林妖」的英雄,殺雞宰羊,篝火燒到半夜——火光映在每張笑臉上,你們卻誰也吃不下去。此後的苔鐘村太平無事:藤蔓枯了,怪夢絕了,森林一年年往後退,退成一片灰白的枯木;水井跟著乾了,井底再沒有歌。石碑上被鑿去的那段村史,終究沒人補上,新一代的孩子連問都不會問。只有你們偶爾想起灰燼裡最後看到的一幕:焦黑的土裡,一點翡翠色的新芽,正安安靜靜地,頂開灰殼。十年,或者二十年。它等得起。
nodes.narrationEn: The Forest Heart does not break like wood; it breaks like a string kept taut for ten years. Fire swallows the great tree along the veins of its own vines, and the emerald flowers burst one by one into scattering sparks, a snowfall played backward. Seffa does not struggle. Before the fire closes she hangs in the light, watching you, and says softly, in that borrowed voice you know so well: "Same as last time." Then the fire finishes whatever else she had to say. The villagers wake in the dusk with no memory of the day; overjoyed, they feast you — the heroes who slew the forest witch — kill chickens, roast a sheep, burn a bonfire half the night; the firelight plays across every laughing face, and not one of you can eat. Mossbell is peaceful ever after: the vines wither, the strange dreams end, and the forest retreats year by year into a stand of grey-white deadwood; the well dries with it, and there is no more singing at its bottom. The chiselled gap in the village record is never filled; the next generation of children never even think to ask. Only sometimes you remember the last thing you saw in the ashes: in the scorched black earth, a point of emerald — a new shoot, quietly, calmly, lifting away its cap of ash. Ten years, or twenty. It can wait.

中期.objective: 進出共享夢境,查明十年前處刑的真相與記憶種子的下落
中期.context: 夢中慶典重演舊罪,年幼的瑟芙握著喚醒全村的關鍵;夢外的藤蔓仍在收緊。
中期.stakes: 日落後夢境將永久覆寫現實,村民將忘記自己曾經醒著。
中期.objectiveEn: Pass between waking and the shared dream, and uncover the truth of the execution ten years past and the whereabouts of the memory seed
中期.contextEn: In the dream the festival replays the old sin, and the child Seffa holds the key to waking the village; outside the dream, the vines are still drawing tight.
中期.stakesEn: After sundown the dream will overwrite reality for good, and the villagers will forget they were ever awake.

後期.objective: 深入森林心臟,與森心瑟芙做個了斷——喚醒村莊,或讓它長眠
後期.context: 成年瑟芙與巨樹合而為一;喚醒即揭罪,遺忘即安寧,代價總要有人擔。
後期.stakes: 夢根已纏上隊伍的手腕;再猶豫,你們也將成為夢的一部分。
後期.objectiveEn: Go deep into the forest's heart and settle things with Seffa of the Forest Heart — wake the village, or let it sleep forever
後期.contextEn: The grown Seffa and the great tree are now one; to wake the village is to unbury its sin, to forget is to keep its peace — and someone must always bear the cost.
後期.stakesEn: The dream's roots are already wound about your wrists; hesitate longer, and you too become part of the dream.

結局.objective: 見證苔鐘村的甦醒或沉眠
結局.context: 記憶的代價已依你們的抉擇落定。
結局.objectiveEn: Witness Mossbell Village wake, or sleep on
結局.contextEn: The price of memory has come due, according to your choice.
結局.stakesEn: The ending is set. There is no turning back.
